label: std_cost_create_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal wrapper → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog + DialogContent with size='wide' variant (min-w-[720px])
Local useState per field (item, mat, lab, oh, effFrom, basis, notes) → single useForm(zodResolver(stdCostSchema)) with .watch() for derived total/breakdown
Inline cost breakdown stack-bar (CSS width % spans) → shadcn Progress or a custom div with tailwind width classes driven by zod-watched values
Hardcoded item dropdown options → Drizzle SELECT from items table in a Server Component passed as prop; filter by itemType ∈ ['FA','RM','Intermediate']
warnChange >20% banner rendered inline → toast or Alert component gated by useEffect watching total; threshold comes from finance_settings.cost_change_warning_threshold_pct
Three footer buttons (Cancel / Save as Draft / Save & Submit) → DialogFooter with Server Actions: saveDraft(data) and submitForApproval(data) both behind RBAC check role ∈ ['Finance Manager','Admin']
Hardcoded labels/placeholder strings → next-intl t('finance.stdCost.create.*') keys
BL-FIN-07: dual sign-off for >20% cost change is not yet enforced — add a second ApproveStdCostModal call after save when warnChange is true (Phase 2)
known_bugs: BL-FIN-07 — dual sign-off for >20% cost change mentioned in warning but not enforced (Phase 2 deferred)

label: approve_std_cost_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; two-phase render (form vs success screen) modelled as conditional JSX driven by submitted state → use useFormState / server action with optimistic UI or a local step state ('idle' | 'success')

PIN input (plain <input type='password' maxLength=6>) → dedicated PinInput component (shadcn has no built-in; use react-input-otp or Input with OTP styling); value fed into Server Action that computes SHA-256(approver_id + record_id + timestamp + PIN) server-side with Node crypto module
Summary component (inline key-value rows) → shadcn Separator + dl/dt/dd pattern; emphasis rows get font-semibold class
Old vs New cost 2-column diff cards (inline divs with CSS vars) → shadcn Card with variant coloring; percentage delta computed server-side and passed as prop
Approval reason textarea (ReasonInput with minLength=10) → FormField with zod .min(10) validation and character counter via useWatch
Hardcoded audit-hash display ('sha256:9f8e7d…') → real SHA-256 hash returned from Server Action stored in std_cost_approvals table; displayed in a Code/pre element
Bulk approve path (data.bulk count) → same modal but summary lists item count; Server Action iterates and approves each; wrap in a DB transaction
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('finance.stdCost.approve.*') keys

label: cost_history_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog size='wide'; read-only content so no form — just DialogContent + close button in DialogFooter plus 'Create New Version' button that closes dialog and opens StdCostCreateModal
Hardcoded history array (3 mock versions) → Drizzle SELECT from std_costs WHERE item_code = ? ORDER BY effective_from DESC with status in ('active','superseded')
TrendChart (inline SVG zero-dep chart) → recharts LineChart or shadcn chart wrapper (Recharts under the hood as of shadcn/ui chart component); pass labels + series as props from Server Component

Version Compare selects (two <select> elements + Compare button) → controlled selects via useState; diff computation done as a derived value (useMemo) from the two selected version objects, not a server round-trip
Inline color for active row (borderLeft: '3px solid var(--blue)') → TableRow with conditional className cn({ 'border-l-2 border-blue-600': h.active })
StdStatus badge component → shadcn Badge with variant mapping: active→green, superseded→secondary, draft→outline, pending→yellow
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('finance.costHistory.*') keys

label: bulk_import_csv_modal
translation_notes: Custom Stepper component (step/completed Set state) → shadcn Steps or a simple ol with step indicator rendered from steps array; current/completed state managed by useReducer('upload'|'validate'|'review')

Drag-drop file zone (plain div with dashed border + browse button) → shadcn does not have a Dropzone — use react-dropzone library; wire onDrop to a Server Action that streams CSV to a Vercel Blob or temp table

Validation preview table (mock counts: 48 valid, 2 error, 3 warnings) → Server Action returns ParseResult { valid: Row[], errors: ErrorRow[], warnings: WarnRow[] }; render in DataTable; error rows get bg-red-50 class
skipErrors checkbox + submitForApproval checkbox → controlled checkboxes stored in local state; passed as options to the final import Server Action
Three-footer-button pattern per step (Back/Cancel/Next) → DialogFooter with conditional button rendering driven by current step; Back and Next update step state
Template CSV download link → Next.js API Route GET /api/finance/std-costs/import/template that streams a template CSV with correct column headers
Hardcoded column list (item_code, item_type, effective_from…) → derive from Zod import schema so both validation and template stay in sync
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('finance.bulkImport.*') keys

label: fx_rate_override_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog size='default'; single-page form
Local useState (newRate, effDate, source, reason) → useForm(zodResolver(fxRateSchema)) where schema uses .superRefine to require reason.min(20) only when source === 'manual'
Radio buttons for source (Manual/API Pull) → shadcn RadioGroup + RadioGroupItem; changing to 'API Pull' hides ReasonInput via conditional rendering
ReasonInput component (textarea with minLength) → FormField wrapping Textarea + FormMessage showing character count: `${value.length}/20+ chars`
Summary rows (Currency, Current Rate) → inline dl/dt/dd or use shared SummaryList component pattern consistent with other modals
Server Action updateFxRate(data) must: validate RBAC (Finance Manager), write to fx_rates table with effective_date, log to audit_log table, NOT recalculate historical transactions
Hardcoded 'GBP' references → read finance_settings.base_currency; make base currency configurable via FinSettings
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('finance.fx.override.*') keys

label: fifo_layers_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog size='wide'; read-only so no form; single Close button in DialogFooter
FIN_FIFO_LAYERS mock data (layers array with exhausted flag) → Drizzle SELECT from inventory_fifo_layers WHERE item_code = ? AND site_id = ? ORDER BY receipt_date ASC; exhausted = qty_remaining = 0
Custom fifo-row div layout (CSS grid with head/data rows) → shadcn Table with TableHeader/TableBody; exhausted rows get className='opacity-50 line-through' or a Badge 'Exhausted'

Summary rows (Total Qty, Total Value, Active Layers) → shared SummaryList primitive; Total Value formatted with fmtMoney equivalent via Intl.NumberFormat('en-GB', { style: 'currency', currency: 'GBP' })
Layer number badge (exhausted shows ✕, active shows n) → shadcn Badge variant='outline' with conditional icon: XIcon vs a number
Source ref link (colored blue, ref field) → Next.js Link to the relevant LP or PO detail route
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('finance.fifoLayers.*') keys
Consider caching: FIFO layer query can be expensive; add React cache() or use ISR with a short revalidate on the layer data route

label: variance_note_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog size='default'; minimal form (category select + textarea)

Local useState (cat, note) → useForm(zodResolver(varianceNoteSchema)) with category: z.enum(['Root Cause','Supplier Issue','Production Issue','Quality Hold','Planned','Other']) and note: z.string().min(20).max(1000)
Context prop (ctx.wo or ctx.item) renders conditionally in Summary → discriminated union type in schema prop; Summary component renders both WO link and product name when both present
ReasonInput (textarea with minLength) → shadcn Textarea with FormMessage for character validation; add character counter div below textarea
Server Action saveVarianceNote(data) → INSERT into variance_notes table linking to either wo_id or item_code; emit audit log entry; optionally notify Finance Manager via notification outbox
Category enum options hardcoded → keep in a shared constants file (variance-note-categories.ts) so both modal and DB enum stay in sync
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('finance.varianceNote.*') keys

label: dlq_replay_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog size='default'; destructive action pattern — use DialogDescription to explain consequences; footer has Cancel and 'Replay Event' (primary, not destructive color since replay is a recovery action)
permanent error category warning banner (alert-amber) → shadcn Alert variant='warning' with AlertTriangleIcon; conditionally rendered when r.category === 'permanent'
Summary rows (DLQ ID, Event Type, Source Event, Category, Attempts, Moved to DLQ) → shared SummaryList; DlqCategoryBadge maps to Badge variant
Last Error preformatted block (font-mono, red, max-h, overflow-y) → shadcn code element inside a ScrollArea with max-h-24; error text colored text-red-700
ReasonInput with min 20 chars → FormField + Textarea with zod .min(20) and live character count
Server Action replayDlqEvent(id, reason): generate UUID v7 idempotency key, UPDATE dlq_events SET status='replaying', INSERT into outbox_events with new key and status='pending'; log audit_log entry
Hardcoded retry schedule note ('6-attempt retry schedule') → read from d365_integration_settings.retry_schedule config rather than hardcoding
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('finance.dlq.replay.*') keys

label: dlq_resolve_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog size='default'; destructive confirmation pattern — 'Mark Resolved' button should be variant='destructive' in shadcn since this closes the event permanently with no retry
Local state (notes, ack) → useForm(zodResolver(dlqResolveSchema)) with notes: z.string().min(30) and ack: z.literal(true) to force checkbox acknowledgement
alert-blue info banner → shadcn Alert variant='default' (blue info) with InfoIcon; explains manual resolution path
Acknowledgement checkbox (required) → FormField wrapping Checkbox; zod .literal(true) prevents submit until checked
Server Action resolveDlqEvent(id, notes): UPDATE dlq_events SET status='resolved', resolved_at=now(), resolved_by=session.userId, resolution_notes=notes; do NOT insert to outbox; emit audit_log
Hardcoded min 30 char requirement → configure via finance_settings.dlq_resolve_min_chars or keep as constant DLQ_RESOLVE_MIN_CHARS = 30
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('finance.dlq.resolve.*') keys

label: finance_export_report_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog size='default'; reusable across all Finance screens — accepts a name/id prop to label the export
Format radio (CSV/PDF) → shadcn RadioGroup; PDF export triggers Puppeteer edge function (see BL-RPT-04 in BACKLOG); CSV streams directly from a Next.js Route Handler
Date Range select (MTD/Last Month/QTD/YTD/Custom) → shadcn Select; Custom option conditionally reveals two date Inputs via animated Collapsible or simple conditional render
Custom date range fields → DatePicker components (shadcn Calendar + Popover) instead of plain <input type='date'>
Include filters checkboxes → shadcn Checkbox items; filter values passed to Server Action / Route Handler as query params

Async export pattern (download link when ready) → Server Action enqueues export job to export_queue table, returns jobId; client polls GET /api/finance/exports/[jobId]/status via SWR with 3s interval; shows progress via shadcn Progress; auto-downloads when status='complete'
Notes/Comments textarea (optional, PDF footer) → FormField wrapping Textarea; only sent when fmt === 'PDF'
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('finance.export.*') keys

label: supersede_std_cost_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog size='default'; single date input + info banner + summary — straightforward single-field confirmation modal
alert-blue info banner (explains supersede flow) → shadcn Alert variant='default' with InfoIcon
Summary rows (Item, Current Cost, Effective From, Status) → shared SummaryList component; StdStatus badge maps to shadcn Badge variant
Supersede date picker (plain <input type='date'>) → shadcn DatePicker (Calendar + Popover); default = today server-side via new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]

Server Action supersedeStdCost(id, supDate): UPDATE std_costs SET effective_to=supDate, status='superseded' WHERE id=id AND status='active'; must be atomic; original approval record stays immutable per 21 CFR Part 11
21 CFR Part 11 compliance note shown inline → also enforce server-side: Server Action must reject if record status !== 'active'
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('finance.stdCost.supersede.*') keys

label: period_lock_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog size='default'; the 'Lock Period' button must be variant='destructive' (shadcn Button) since action is irreversible — prototype uses btn-danger which maps to destructive
alert-amber warning ('cannot be undone') → shadcn Alert variant='destructive' with AlertTriangleIcon
Period select dropdown (hardcoded Jan/Feb/Mar 2026) → Drizzle SELECT from fiscal_periods WHERE status IN ('open') ORDER BY period_start; passed as Server Component prop
Reason textarea (min 20 chars) → FormField + Textarea with zod .min(20) and character counter
PIN input (21 CFR Part 11 e-signature) → same PinInput component used by ApproveStdCostModal; share the component; Server Action validates PIN then locks the period
Server Action lockFiscalPeriod(periodId, reason, pin): verify PIN, UPDATE fiscal_periods SET status='locked', locked_at=now(), locked_by=userId, lock_reason=reason; emit audit_log with SHA-256 hash
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('finance.periodLock.*') keys

label: cost_center_gl_mapping_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog size='default'; create/edit shared via editing boolean from data prop — same pattern as StdCostCreateModal
Cost Category select (Material/Labor/Overhead/Waste/Freight) → shadcn Select; options from a shared GL_CATEGORIES constant enum
D365 Account Code + Offset Account Code inputs (mono font) → shadcn Input with className='font-mono'; zod validation for format ACCT-DIM1-DIM2 via .regex(/^\d{4}-[A-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]+-[A-Z]+$/)
D365 Journal Name select (PROD/COGS/ADJ) → options from d365_journal_names lookup table fetched server-side
Active checkbox → shadcn Checkbox controlled; maps to is_active column in gl_mappings table
Server Action saveGlMapping(data): upsert into gl_mappings table on (cost_category, site_id); emit audit_log; RBAC: Finance Manager only
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('finance.glMapping.*') keys

label: fin_dashboard
translation_notes: FinDashboard functional component → Next.js App Router Server Component (app/finance/page.tsx) that fetches KPI data in parallel via Promise.all([getFinKpis(), getVarianceAlerts(), getCostTrend(), getTopContributors(), getYieldLoss()]); each query is a Drizzle call with React cache()
FIN_KPIS mock array (6 KPI cards) → KPI data shape defined in types/finance.ts; cards rendered via a reusable KpiCard client component that accepts label/value/sub/accent/href props

FIN_INLINE_ALERTS with dismiss (useState) → persist dismissed state to localStorage or a user_preferences table; client component wrapping alert rows handles dismiss via Server Action or optimistic update
Variance Alerts card (FIN_ALERTS, sorted by severity) → Drizzle query with ORDER BY severity DESC, variance_pct DESC LIMIT 10; clicking a row navigates to WO cost detail via Next.js Link
TrendChart (custom SVG zero-dep) → shadcn Chart (Recharts LineChart) with 3 series (material/labor/overhead); data fetched server-side, serialized to JSON prop
Top Variance Contributors table with rank-bar (CSS width %) → shadcn Table with a custom RankBar client component; bars computed client-side from pctOfTotal prop

Cost Breakdown bars + Waterfall (MTD standard vs actual) → shadcn custom chart or plain div bars; waterfall is unique — build as a dedicated WaterfallChart client component using Recharts ComposedChart
Monthly Yield Loss table (FIN_YIELD_LOSS) → Drizzle JOIN on ncr_events and wo_completions grouped by month/product; EUR→GBP conversion uses fx_rates.rate for each incident date
Onboarding checklist (FIN_ONBOARD, dismissable) → store completion state in finance_onboarding_steps table per user; render as a shadcn Card with CheckCircleIcon per step
Role prop (role === 'Finance Manager') → read from session via auth() in Server Component; pass isManager boolean to client components that need it

label: fin_standard_costs_list
translation_notes: FinStandardCosts → Next.js page with a DataTable client component (shadcn Table + TanStack Table v8) for column sorting, row selection, and pagination; server fetches initial page via Drizzle with status filter + search

Status tabs (All/Active/Pending/Draft/Superseded with counts) → URL search params (?status=active) updated via useRouter().push() or shadcn Tabs controlled by URL; counts fetched in parallel via COUNT(*) GROUP BY status query
Filter bar (search, item type, date range, cost basis) → shadcn Input + Select + DatePicker components; filter state managed by nuqs (URL-first state) so filters are shareable and bookmarkable
Bulk action bar (appears when selected.size > 0) → TanStack Table row selection state drives a floating action bar; bulk approve calls Server Action bulkApproveStdCosts(ids[]) inside a DB transaction
Expandable row detail (approval record + basis/notes) → TanStack Table getExpandedRowModel(); expanded content rendered as a sub-row with ColSpan; approval hash displayed as <code> element
Coverage alert (FA items without active standard cost) → Drizzle SELECT COUNT(*) FROM items WHERE item_type='FA' LEFT JOIN std_costs ON ... WHERE std_costs.id IS NULL; surface as Alert above tabs
Role-based button visibility (isManager checks) → derive from session in Server Component; pass as prop to DataTable; or use a server-side permissions utility per action
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('finance.standardCosts.*') keys; pagination labels from shadcn DataTable defaults

label: fin_inventory_valuation
translation_notes: FinInventoryValuation → Server Component page; valuation method (FIFO/WAC) and date controlled via URL params (?method=FIFO&asOf=2026-04-21); changing them triggers server re-fetch
Method toggle buttons (FIFO/WAC + date picker + Apply) → shadcn SegmentedControl (use ToggleGroup) + DatePicker + Button that submits form with router.replace() to update URL params

Value Distribution mini-chart (inline bar rows with color categories) → custom DistributionBars client component using div bars; data comes from Drizzle GROUP BY item_type query aggregating qty * avg_cost
Main inventory table (avg unit cost, total value, layers, aging) → shadcn DataTable with TanStack; 'Layers' column renders as a Link that opens FifoLayersModal via openModal callback
AgingBadge (0-30d / 30-60d / 60-90d / 90d+) → shadcn Badge with variant mapped from days_since_last_movement; computed server-side from last_movement_date
Page total / all pages total footer → DataTable footer slot showing sum of visible rows vs total from server; use Intl.NumberFormat for GBP formatting
Recalculate button → Server Action triggerInventoryRevaluation(method, asOf); enqueues a background job; shows toast 'Recalculation queued' on response
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('finance.inventoryValuation.*') keys

label: fin_fx_rates
translation_notes: FinFxRates → Server Component page; fetches FX rates from Drizzle fx_rates table with last_updated; staleRate detection (ageDays > 7) computed server-side
Stale rate Alert (amber) → shadcn Alert variant='warning'; shown when any active rate has updated_at < now() - 7 days; server-computed staleRate prop
Currency table (Rate Age badge: fresh/stale/expired) → shadcn Table; RateAgeBadge maps ageDays to Badge variant: >7d = destructive, >5d = warning, else = secondary
Rate History table + currency selector → client component with useState(selCurrency); history data fetched via SWR or a Server Action getExchangeRateHistory(currency) on currency change

TrendChart (2 series: EUR + USD) → shadcn Chart (Recharts LineChart); data normalized to actual rate values (not ×10000) — prototype multiplies by 10000 for SVG integer math, production uses floating point in Recharts
FxSourceBadge (Manual/API) → shadcn Badge; source stored in fx_rates.source_type ENUM('manual','api')
'Change Base Currency' link → destructive action guarded by Finance Manager role; opens a dedicated confirmation modal (not prototyped); mark as P2 scope
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('finance.fx.*') keys

label: fin_material_variance
translation_notes: FinVarMaterial → Server Component page; fetches material variance from Drizzle via a view or CTE: SELECT item_code, SUM(actual_qty - std_qty) as usage_delta, SUM(actual_unit_cost - std_unit_cost) as price_delta, SUM(variance_amount) as total_var FROM material_consumption_costs WHERE period = ? GROUP BY item_code
3 KPI tiles (Total / Price / Usage variance) → shadcn Card KPI pattern; Phase 2 tiles (MPV/MQV) rendered with Badge 'Phase 2' and muted placeholder values — see BL-FIN-01
Multi-field filter bar (period preset, date range, item search, item type, cost center, variance type, significance threshold) → URL params via nuqs; each filter is a shadcn Select or Input
VarBadge component (colored badge with % and direction) → shadcn Badge with variant driven by: >10% = destructive, >5% = warning, ≤5% = secondary; show fav/unfav direction
WO Links column ('N WOs') → Link to var_drilldown page pre-filtered by item_code; or open an inline popover listing linked WOs
Drill button → Link to /finance/variance/drilldown?item={itemCode}
Note button → opens VarianceNoteModal via client-side modal state
BL-FIN-01: full MPV/MQV decomposition is Phase 2 — render P2 placeholder KPIs with a Badge 'Phase 2 — EPIC 10-I' and disable the decomposition columns in the table
known_bugs: BL-FIN-01 — full MPV/MQV decomposition (P2 EPIC 10-I) not yet implemented; KPI tiles show placeholder values

label: fin_labor_variance
translation_notes: FinVarLabor → Server Component page; data from Drizzle query on labor_cost_actuals JOIN wo_labor_standards; Group by wo_id, operation, line
3 KPI tiles (Total Labor Var / LRV placeholder / LEV placeholder) → same KPI Card pattern as FinVarMaterial; Phase 2 tiles render with muted value '—' and Badge 'Phase 2'
Multi-field filter bar (period, date range, line, cost center, operation, variance type) → nuqs URL params; Select options for lines and operations fetched from production_lines and operations tables
Labor table columns (WO, Operation, Line, Std/Actual Hrs/Rate/Cost, Variance, %) → shadcn DataTable; Δ Hrs and rate columns colored via className cn({ 'text-red-600': delta > 0 })
VarBadge → same reusable component as FinVarMaterial; threshold config from finance_settings
'View WO' button → Next.js Link to /finance/wo-costs/[woId] detail page
BL-FIN-01: LRV/LEV decomposition is Phase 2 — render placeholder KPI tiles with note
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('finance.laborVariance.*') keys
known_bugs: BL-FIN-01 — LRV/LEV decomposition (Phase 2) not yet available; shown as placeholder KPI tiles

label: fin_variance_drilldown
translation_notes: FinVarDrilldown → Client Component page driven by level state (0-4); each level change can either stay client-side (already loaded data) or trigger a new Drizzle query via Server Action; use URL params (?level=2&item=RM-BREAST-001&wo=WO-2026-0108) for deep linkability
Breadcrumb trail (drill-trail with dt-step spans) → shadcn Breadcrumb component; each step is a clickable Button that resets level state and URL
Level 0 — 4-tile category summary (Material/Labor/Overhead/Waste) → shadcn Card grid; tile onclick updates URL param level=1&cat=Material
Level 1 — item list ranked by absolute variance with rank-bar → shadcn Table with a custom RankBar client component; data from getVarianceDrillL1(cat, period) Server Action
Level 2 — WO list for selected item → shadcn Table; data from getVarianceDrillL2(itemCode, period) Drizzle query
Level 3 — WO cost summary embedded + transaction list → reuse WO detail data from fin_wo_detail; transaction lines rendered as a scrollable <code> list or a mini Table
Level 4 — Transaction raw record → shared SummaryList component; source links to Warehouse LP movement route

Side panel (sticky, running variance + quick actions) → shadcn Card with position:sticky equivalent (sticky top-24); quick actions: Export button triggers export_report_modal, Add Note opens variance_note_modal
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('finance.drilldown.*') keys

label: fin_wo_list
translation_notes: FinWoList → Server Component page; fetches WO cost records from Drizzle JOIN wo_completions ON wo_cost_actuals; filter by status, date range, search, variance threshold
Status tabs (All/Open/Closed/Posted) with counts → URL params (?status=closed); counts via parallel COUNT queries or a single GROUP BY status query
Variance filter select (All/Favorable/Unfavorable/>5%/>10%) → nuqs URL param; Drizzle WHERE clause: variance < 0 (fav), variance > 0 (unfav), ABS(variance_pct) > threshold
WO table row (color-coded variance, WoCostStatus badge, D365 journal ref) → shadcn DataTable; clicking a row navigates to /finance/wo-costs/[woId]
VarBadge + WoCostStatus badges → reusable client components; WoCostStatus maps: open=amber, closed=blue, posted=green
D365 journal ref column → Link to FinD365 page filtered by batch_id when journal ref is present
Empty state panel → shadcn EmptyState pattern: centered icon + heading + body text + CTA button to clear filters
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('finance.woList.*') keys

label: fin_wo_detail
translation_notes: FinWoDetail → Server Component page /finance/wo-costs/[woId]; fetches WO detail from Drizzle including breakdown, varianceDetail, cascade, notes via Promise.all for parallel queries

Two-column layout (360px sidebar + flex main) → CSS Grid with grid-cols-[360px_1fr] or Tailwind grid; sidebar contains WO info card, main contains cost summary + breakdown + variance + cascade + notes + D365 status
WO Information card (key-value pairs with dividers) → shadcn Card with dl/dt/dd definition list; planned vs produced qty in a 2-col sub-grid within the card
Cost Summary card (borderLeft color driven by variancePct) → shadcn Card with a dynamic border-l-4 class: ≥10% = border-red-500, ≥5% = border-amber-500, else = border-green-500
Cost Breakdown bars + Waterfall chart → reuse client components from FinDashboard (CostBreakdownBars + WaterfallChart); waterfall data built from breakdown array with variance contributions
Variance Breakdown expandable rows (material/labor/overhead/waste) → shadcn Accordion with AccordionItem per category; Phase 2 P2 sub-components (MPV/MQV/LRV/LEV) shown as muted placeholder text
Cascade table (parent/child WOs, own cost, cascade cost) → shadcn Table; data from recursive CTE wo_dependencies in Drizzle raw SQL; shown only when d.cascade is non-empty
Variance Notes list → chronological list of cards with author avatar, category badge, timestamp, text; Add Note button opens VarianceNoteModal
D365 posting status badge → maps d.d365Status to Badge variant + descriptive text string; fetch from wo_d365_postings table

label: fin_reports
translation_notes: FinReports → Server Component page; fetches saved reports from Drizzle fin_reports table (system=true reports seeded via migration)
Three tabs (Saved Reports / Run Custom Report / Export Queue) → URL params (?tab=saved); shadcn Tabs component
Saved reports card grid (rep-grid) → CSS grid of shadcn Cards; 'Run Now' button triggers export_report_modal with the report's config pre-populated

Custom Report Builder (left panel form + right panel preview) → left panel is a shadcn Form with Field components; right panel shows a read-only DataTable preview fetched via Server Action previewReport(config) — debounced 500ms
Report preview table (first 25 of N rows) → shadcn DataTable showing FIN_WOS-equivalent data from the actual WO costs query with LIMIT 25; 'View All' row count from COUNT(*) subquery
Export Queue tab → shadcn Table showing export_queue rows; auto-refresh via useEffect + SWR polling every 30s; Download button uses a signed URL from Vercel Blob or R2
Report Type select options (Cost by Product, Variance Summary, etc.) → enum stored in DB; each type maps to a specific Drizzle query handler function in lib/finance/reports/
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('finance.reports.*') keys

label: fin_d365_integration
translation_notes: FinD365 → Server Component page /finance/d365; fetches connection status, summary KPIs, batch/outbox/DLQ/GL data in parallel; refreshes every 60s via a client shell component using SWR or router.refresh()
5 tabs (Daily Batches / Outbox Queue / DLQ / GL Mapping / Settings) → URL params (?tab=batches); shadcn Tabs

Connection status card (connected dot, env/instance/dataAreaId/warehouse info) → shadcn Card; connection status from a health-check Server Action pingD365() called server-side at page render time; connected dot uses a CSS animation for pulsing green when connected
4 KPI tiles (pending / batches / journal lines / DLQ open) → shadcn Card KPI pattern; DLQ tile is variant='destructive' when dlqOpen > 0
Daily Batches table → shadcn Table; D365BatchStatus badge maps: posted=green, pending=amber, failed=red; reconciled column shows CheckIcon
Outbox Queue table → shadcn Table; D365OutboxStatus badge; lastError column with text-overflow:ellipsis via Tailwind truncate class + Tooltip showing full error on hover
DLQ table → shadcn Table; Replay and Resolve buttons open dlq_replay_modal and dlq_resolve_modal respectively; permanent error rows get bg-red-50 row class
GL Mapping tab → shadcn Table listing fin_d365_gl_mapping; inline Edit button opens cost_center_gl_mapping_modal
Settings tab → inline form fields (checkbox, time input, read-only fields); changes trigger FinSettings Server Action or D365 settings-specific action; consider merging with FinSettings page

label: fin_settings
translation_notes: FinSettings → Server Component page /finance/settings that pre-loads current settings from finance_settings table; Client Component wrapper handles dirty state tracking and form submission

Multi-step approval chain → query approval_steps WHERE project_id=? ORDER BY step_order; each step shows who/name/status/when
Submit for approval button → Server Action submitForApproval(projectId) that creates approval_step records, sends notifications (email via SMTP or outbox)
Step status badges (Approved/Awaiting/Pending) → shadcn Badge variants
approval-step CSS class with done/current/pending states → Tailwind conditional border-l-4 or left-border pattern

label: pilot_screen
translation_notes: Pilot run plan 4-column grid → Tailwind grid grid-cols-4 gap-4; each cell has label + value pattern; extract PilotDetailCell component
Material reservation table → Server Component query pilot_material_reservations WHERE pilot_id=?; status derived from available vs required comparison
Short material alert with 'Raise PO' link → shadcn Alert variant='warning'; Link triggers PO creation flow in Planning module
Pilot checklist (done/pending) → query pilot_checklist_items WHERE pilot_id=?; checkbox rendering with conditional strikethrough
Status badge (Reserved / Short) → shadcn Badge; 'Short' maps to amber variant with quantity diff shown
Scheduled pilot header alert → shadcn Alert variant='info'

label: handoff_screen
translation_notes: Handoff checklist (all checked) → query handoff_checklist_items WHERE project_id=?; derive done state from DB flags not hardcoded booleans
Destination BOM table → Server Component shows proposed BOM code (next available BOM-XXX from sequence), SKU, effective date
What happens on promote ordered list → shadcn Card with OrderedList; steps are static but BOM code is dynamic
Promote to production BOM button → Server Action promoteToProductionBOM(projectId): creates BOM record, activates SKU in Planning, schedules WO, archives NPD project; wrap in DB transaction
Export handoff packet button → Server Action generateHandoffPacketPDF(projectId) using react-pdf or Puppeteer
Ready to promote Alert → only shown when all handoff_checklist_items are checked; Server Component derives from DB state

label: gate_checklist_panel
translation_notes: GATE_CHECKLISTS constant → query gate_checklist_items WHERE project_id=? from DB; categories + items derived from DB rows (category_code, item_text, required, completed_at, completed_by_user)
resolveItems + getBlockers helpers (local override state) → Server Component derives done state from DB; re-fetch on mutation
Local overrides state (checkbox toggle) → Server Action toggleGateChecklistItem(itemId, done); invalidate router cache after
Overall progress bar (all gates) → computed aggregate: COUNT(*) done / COUNT(*) total over all gates for this project
Expand/collapse per gate → shadcn Collapsible (import from @radix-ui/react-collapsible) with persistent open state in URL param or localStorage
Category header (TECHNICAL, BUSINESS, COMPLIANCE) → rendered from category.code with i18n key npd.gate.category.<code>
Blocker list at bottom → derived from Server Component query; red Alert with AlertDescription listing blocker item texts
Advance / Request approval footer button → onClick fires openModal('advanceGate') or openModal('gateApproval') depending on gate.requires_approval flag from DB
Hardcoded gate labels (Idea, Feasibility…) → npd.gate.label.<gateCode> next-intl keys

label: advance_gate_modal
translation_notes: AdvanceGateModal receives { project } in data prop → Server Component pre-loads: current gate info, required items count, blockers list
requiredDone / requiredItems counts → computed server-side from gate_checklist_items query; pass as props
Blockers list (red items) → Server Action getGateBlockers(projectId, gate) returns required items with completed_at IS NULL
Gate transition visual (dashed arrow when blocked) → SVG or CSS dashed-border arrow; blocked state gated by blockers.length > 0
Notes textarea (disabled when blockers) → disabled prop driven by props.blockers.length > 0

Confirm advance Server Action → advanceProjectGate(projectId): validates no blockers in DB, updates project.current_gate, creates gate_events record, emits npd.gate.advanced outbox event; reject with 422 if blockers exist
Hardcoded gate labels → next-intl npd.gate.label.<key>

label: gate_approval_modal
translation_notes: Approve/Reject radio decision → RadioGroup + RadioGroupItem (shadcn); decision drives conditional UI

E-signature overlay (password + confirmation checkbox) → separate shadcn Dialog within Dialog or a step state machine ('decision' | 'esign' | 'submitted'); password field bound to useForm zod schema with z.string().min(6)

E-signature Server Action → verifyAndApproveGate(projectId, gate, decision, password): verify password via bcrypt against user.password_hash, create gate_approvals record with esigned_at timestamp, advance gate on approve, emit npd.gate.approved / npd.gate.rejected outbox event
Project header (product name, code, stage badge) → Server Component joins projects table; pass as prop
Rejection reason textarea → required when decision='reject' (zod .refine: if decision=reject then reason.length > 0)
Hardcoded role label (NPD Lead) → session.user.role from next-auth/Clerk; displayed as next-intl npd.role.<role>

label: approval_history_timeline
translation_notes: APPROVAL_HISTORY_SAMPLE constant → Server Component queries gate_approvals JOIN gate_events WHERE project_id=? ORDER BY created_at DESC
Vertical timeline (green/red circles, connector line) → CSS: relative container + absolute left border line; each entry is relative positioned; approved=green circle, rejected=red
View signature details expandable panel → shadcn Collapsible per timeline entry; shows approver, timestamp, SHA-256 hash from gate_approvals.esign_hash
eSigned badge → gate_approvals.esigned_at IS NOT NULL; show Badge variant='outline' with Lock icon
Gate label badges (G0 Idea, G1 Feasibility…) → Badge with gate code + next-intl npd.gate.label.<key>
Empty state (no approvals yet) → Alert with AlertDescription 'No approvals recorded yet for this project'

label: annotate_downtime_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog with forwardRef and aria-labelledby
Local useState (notes, catOverride, submitting) → useForm + zodResolver with z.object({ notes: z.string().min(1).max(500), catOverride: z.string() })
Mock data prop → Server Component fetching downtime event by ID via Drizzle from downtime_events table (08-PRODUCTION authoritative)
Hardcoded role string prop → session.user.role from next-auth/Clerk, RBAC guard in Server Action
PATCH /api/production/downtime-events/:id → Server Action with outbox event emitted on success
isSupervisor inline check → centralized can(role, 'downtime:override-category') policy function
editWindowClosed hardcoded false → computed server-side: event.ended_at + 3600s < now()
Hardcoded labels (e.g. 'Save note') → next-intl t('oee.downtime.annotate.save')

label: export_oee_modal

sections useState object → useForm with z.object({ format: z.enum(['csv','pdf']), sections: z.object({...}) })
POST /api/reporting/export → Server Action calling 12-REPORTING export engine; queues a background job and returns jobId
Filename preview string interpolation → computed in useMemo, update on form value changes
XLSX option rendered disabled with P2 badge → feature-flag guard oee.export.xlsx_enabled, hide entirely when false
Raw snapshot warning (5 MB / 15-30s) → persist as toast notification after modal closes, not blocking alert
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('oee.export.*') keys

Save override button → Server Action PUT /api/settings/oee/line-overrides/:lineId with RBAC oee_admin guard
Hardcoded tenant default hint (70/70/80/95) → fetched from oee_alert_thresholds tenant row, not hardcoded

Inline row selects mutating array copy → useFieldArray from react-hook-form for dynamic mapping rows

PUT /api/settings/oee/big-loss-mapping → Server Action; must invalidate all oee_daily_summary materialized views after publish

Mock CHANGEOVER_EVENTS data prop → Server Component fetching from changeover_events table (08-PRODUCTION authoritative)
Cross-link button → Next.js <Link href={`/production/changeover/${data.id}`}> rather than window.alert
Allergen risk field → color-coded Badge; allergen matrix ownership note kept as info Alert
Target duration → fetched from 02-SETTINGS changeover_target_duration_min per line, not embedded in event row

HEATMAP_APQ mock lookup → Server Action / loader fetching oee_shift_metrics row for (line, day, shift) triple

reason.length >= 10 inline validation → zod z.string().min(10, 'Minimum 10 characters') in useForm

Server Action: POST /api/oee/anomalies/:id/acknowledge; branches on action field; emits outbox event for audit workflow

60s auto-refresh interval → useInterval hook paused when pauseUntil > Date.now()
No server interaction needed — purely client-side state management
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('oee.autoRefresh.*')

Inline alert for LINE-02 → alerts driven by data: if any line OEE < threshold for 3 consecutive days, render Alert with drill link; no hardcoding
Three-tab layout (Summary / Six Big Losses / Changeover) → shadcn Tabs + TabsContent; tab state synced to URL ?tab= param
Sortable table → TanStack Table with server-side sort via searchParam col/dir; useOptimistic for immediate re-order UX

OEE impact decomposition <pre> block → computed server-side from real A/P/Q values, rendered as formatted text or a dedicated Card

Role-conditional column hint text → server-side: pass role from session, render appropriate hint; no client-side role check in JSX
Hardcoded legend labels (Plant/Process/People) → next-intl t('oee.losses.class.*') with Lean class enum

Allergen risk badge color mapping (High=red, Medium=amber, Low=green) → cva variant map shared across modules; enum driven from allergen_risk_level column
Variance badge (+/- colored) → shared <VarianceBadge> primitive with sign-aware color logic
View → button → opens changeover_detail_modal client-side with fetched row data

TrendChart with downtime bands + changeover markers → recharts ComposedChart with ReferenceArea (downtime) + ReferenceLine (changeover); data from oee_snapshots + changeover_events join

LINE-02 alert hardcoded → alert driven by data: if any single downtime event > 60 min in window, render Alert with annotate CTA
Spark 7-day sparkline → recharts LineChart mini or inline SVG; data from oee_snapshots rolling 7-day window

BL-OEE-09: Recharts dependency consideration vs inline SVG (Low priority)

HEATMAP mock nested object → Server Component fetching oee_shift_metrics MV for given week, shaped into line×day×shift lookup
Heatmap grid role='grid' with gridcell + aria-label → keep ARIA attributes; add onKeyDown arrow-key navigation (BL-OEE-04)
heatColor() inline function → CSS custom property or Tailwind arbitrary value driven by OEE value thresholds; note BL-OEE-03 for color-blind mode
Selected cell detail panel with ArcGauge quartet → client island; data fetched via Server Action on cell click using (line, day, shift) triple
Four weekly KPI mini-cards → Server Component aggregation over oee_shift_metrics for the selected week
Compare weeks → compare_weeks_modal; BL-OEE-05 diff view remains a backlog item
Heatmap colour scale fixed in P1 (65/85) → note in settings screen; P2: make tenant-configurable via oee_alert_thresholds
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('oee.heatmap.*')

BL-OEE-03: Color-blind mode (Low priority)
BL-OEE-04: Arrow-key nav on heatmap cells (Low priority)
BL-OEE-05: Compare-weeks diff view (Medium priority)

onConfirm → Server Action that enqueues d365.so_pull job to BullMQ/pg-boss; returns job ID for optimistic feedback
Filter description (Open, Confirmed, 14 days) → sourced from plan_settings.d365 config row, not hardcoded
Info alert about planner notifications → informational only; real notification via outbox + email template (SET-090 scope)
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under planning.d365 namespace

label: to_create_edit_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal (size wide) → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog; supports create and edit mode via editing prop
Full inline validation (validate() fn) runs on trySave; errors surfaced per field → useForm with zodResolver; zod schema encodes V-PLAN-TO-001 (from !== to) and V-PLAN-TO-003 (lines.length > 0)
V-PLAN-TO-002 site check currently advisory-only → BACKLOG: add sites lookup table in data.jsx and block at save when from.site !== to.site
addLine/updLine/delLine array mutations → useFieldArray from react-hook-form; UoM auto-fill on product select via getValues/setValue
Save Draft vs Save & Plan dual-CTA → two Server Actions sharing form validation; status field determines WO state transition
requireLpSelection prop showing LP picker CTA → integrates with LPPickerModal; selection stored in form state as lines[].lp_ids
TO_WAREHOUSES and TO_PRODUCTS arrays → fetched from DB (warehouses and products tables); passed as props or via context
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under planning.to namespace
known_bugs: BACKLOG: Planning — warehouse → site taxonomy needed to enforce V-PLAN-TO-002 at save

label: ship_to_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal (size default) → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog
Per-line qty inputs seeded from remaining unshipped qty → useEffect on open seeds useForm defaultValues from TO data
lineErrors per line (V-PLAN-TO-004: shipped_qty <= remaining) → zod refine at array item level; error rendered below each input
Status transition preview (TOStatus badges) → purely derived from totalBatch / totalRemaining comparison; no extra state
nextStatus computation (shipped / partially_shipped / no change) → replicated in Server Action; client display is optimistic preview only
onConfirm → Server Action updates to_lines.shipped_qty, updates TO status, emits to.shipped outbox event
willBeFull floating-point comparison (< 0.0001) → keep same guard in Server Action to avoid rounding issues
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under planning.to.ship namespace

label: draft_wo_review_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal (size wide) → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog
review.materials and review.cascadeChain → fetched via Server Action before modal opens; not computed client-side
availDot colour logic (green/yellow/red) → map from availability_status enum returned by material availability query
Three-way radio action (approve / keep draft / reject) → react-hook-form RadioGroup with zod discriminated union; reject path adds reason field
ReasonInput min 10 chars for reject → zod .min(10) with custom message referencing rule
Allergen hint (line + seqPosition) → fetched from sequencing queue for the WO's assigned line
onConfirm → Server Action: approve triggers WO release + reservation creation; reject deletes draft chain atomically
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under planning.d365.draftReview namespace

label: planning_delete_confirm_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal (size sm) → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog with AlertDialog variant for destructive semantics
Type-to-confirm input pattern → useForm with zod .refine(v => v === entity.id, 'Must match') guard
entity.type/id/impact props → passed from parent with entity type, ID string, and human-readable impact description
Delete button → Server Action with RBAC guard; soft-delete via status=CANCELLED or hard delete depending on entity.type
entity.impact message should be computed server-side (check dependencies, reservations) before modal opens
autoFocus on text input → use Dialog onOpenAutoFocus to focus the confirm input field
Hardcoded labels ('This action is permanent') → next-intl keys under shared.deleteConfirm namespace
Emit entity.deleted outbox event on success

label: hard_lock_release_confirm_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal (size default) → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog with destructive header styling
wo.locks LP list → fetched from lp_reservations table filtered by WO id; passed as prop from parent detail query
Confirmation checkbox → useForm boolean field with zod .literal(true) refinement
Cancel WO & release locks → single Server Action with DB transaction: WO status → CANCELLED, lp_reservations released, outbox events (wo.cancelled, reservation.released_bulk)
LP table (LP, Material, Qty) → shadcn Table with sticky header if many rows
Count of locks in warning text ({wo.locks.length}) → derived from passed prop; no additional state
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under planning.wo.hardLockRelease namespace
Audit log: Server Action must record user, timestamp, and all released LP IDs in lp_reservation_history

label: sequencing_apply_confirm_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal (size default) → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog; Q1 audit decision: preview stays inline in SCREEN-11, this modal is the apply-confirm only
SEQ_QUEUE and SEQ_KPIS globals → fetched as Server Component props from sequencing queue query; passed as serialized prop to modal
criticalExempt filter (queue.filter(q => q.exempt)) → server-side: WOs with priority=critical are exempt; flag returned in queue payload
Acknowledgement checkbox → useForm boolean with zod .literal(true) guard
onConfirm → Server Action: applies allergen_sequencing_heuristic_v1 rule, bulk-updates wo.sequence_position, emits sequencing.applied event
Blast radius count (nWOs on LINE-04) → must be scoped to the selected line (not all lines); line passed as prop
Before/after changeover delta (−N / −N%) → derived from server-side rule output; client displays only
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under planning.sequencing.applyConfirm namespace

label: plan_dashboard
translation_notes: PO_ALERTS/WO_ALERTS/TO_ALERTS globals + dismissed Set state → Server Component fetches alerts from DB; dismiss is a Server Action that writes to user_dismissed_alerts; re-fetches on mutation
PLAN_KPIS array → each KPI tile is a separate async RSC query; aggregate counts from wo, po, to tables via COUNT queries
Upcoming tabs (PO calendar / WO schedule / TO timeline / Cascade chains) → tabbed Server Component with per-tab Drizzle queries; tab selection via URL search params for deep-linkability
ACTIVITY_FEED → sourced from audit_log table filtered by module=planning, ordered by created_at desc, limit 10; cached with next: { revalidate: 60 }
D365 drift alert → derived from po table where d365_drift=true; dismissible via Server Action
Quick strip buttons (Create PO/TO/WO, Bulk import, Run sequencing, Trigger D365) → link to modal openers or route navigations
Three-column alert layout (PO/WO/TO) → CSS grid 3-col with color-coded column headers; each column is its own async RSC
Hardcoded 'Factory-A', data refresh cadence labels → sourced from user session context (active_site) and next.js revalidation config

label: plan_wo_list
translation_notes: Tab counts (PLAN_WOS.filter) → DB-side COUNT per status via Drizzle groupBy; avoid client-side filtering of full dataset
Multi-filter bar (line, priority, allergen, source, date range) → URL search params driving Server Component re-fetch with Drizzle .where() composition
Bulk actions bar (Release selected / Export / Cancel) → useSelectedItems hook; Server Action for bulk-release with transaction; export via route handler streaming CSV
Status-conditional row action buttons (Plan/Release/Start/Pause/Resume/Close) → map from WO status to allowed actions via state machine; RBAC guard in Server Action
KPI mini-cards (Scheduled today, In progress, On hold >24h, This week) → async RSC tiles with individual DB queries; 'On hold >24h' uses timestampdiff in Drizzle raw query
Row click → navigation to /planning/work-orders/[id]; no client-side state needed
AllergenCluster, Avail, WOPlanStatus, Priority, SourceBadge → extract to shared design-system components with shadcn Badge base
Pagination (← Prev / Next →) → cursor-based pagination via URL params; Drizzle .limit().offset() or keyset pagination

label: plan_wo_detail
depends_on_prototypes: planning/wo-detail.jsx (OverviewTab, OutputsTab, DependenciesTab, ReservationsTab, SequencingTab, HistoryTab, D365Tab)
translation_notes: PlanWODetail shell (header + summary bar + tabs) → Server Component fetching PLAN_WO_DETAIL from wo table with all relations in one query
Status-conditional actions map (actions obj) → computed server-side from WO status; state machine rule determines allowed transitions per role
Cascade dependency banner (alert-blue) → conditional on w.cascadeLayer; links to /planning/cascade?highlight=<wo.id>
Tab navigation → shadcn Tabs component; each tab content is an async RSC loaded lazily or via tab URL param
Summary bar (7 key fields) → horizontal scroll on mobile; each cell is a definition-list item
BOM snapshot link → next/link to /technical/bom/:bomVersion
WO head action buttons → Server Actions wrapped in useTransition for optimistic state; each action is guarded by RBAC
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under planning.wo.detail namespace

label: wo_overview_tab
translation_notes: Materials table (BOM snapshot) → Drizzle join: wo_materials + lp_reservations + upstream WO projections in single query; source enum (stock/upstream_wo_output/manual) maps to Badge variant
Meat-pct aggregation row → computed via BOM expand query (FR-PLAN-026); displayed as read-only definition list
Operations table (routing snapshot) → wo_operations table joined with machines; actual_duration populated by Scanner events
Right column sidecars (WO info / Capacity / BOM) → three Card components in a sticky right column (CSS grid 1fr 320px)
Capacity conflict badge → from a capacity slot query; greedy allocation stub in P1, finite-capacity engine in P2
reservedLP hard lock display (per material row) → from lp_reservations table filtered by wo_id + material_code
upstream WO projected qty → from wo_outputs table for the upstream WO; projectedDate from wo.planned_end
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under planning.wo.overview namespace

label: wo_dependencies_tab
translation_notes: Graph/List toggle (pills) → shadcn ToggleGroup; each view is a distinct component rendered conditionally
DAG canvas (layered nodes) → BACKLOG Q2: replace with react-flow in production; for P1 prototype, CSS flexbox layering is acceptable
byLayer grouping (dagNodes forEach) → server-side: wo_dag_view or cascade_edges table; layer number computed from BFS/topo sort in backend
DAG legend → simple inline flex legend; use design token colors for status mapping
List view table (direction, WO, product, reqQty, parentStatus, materialLink) → from wo_dependencies table join
Cycle-check passed badge → from cascade_generation_v1 rule result stored on the WO or chain record
Open full cascade → next/link to /planning/cascade?chain=<chainId>
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under planning.wo.dependencies namespace
known_bugs: Q2 in BACKLOG.md: DAG canvas is layered list, not true directed graph with SVG edges

label: wo_reservations_tab
translation_notes: Reservations table → Drizzle query on lp_reservations filtered by wo_id; columns: material, lp, reserved_qty, type, reserved_at, reserved_by, released_at, release_reason
Status column (Pending on RELEASE / Active / released date) → derived from reservation.status enum + pending_release boolean flag
Release button (admin only, disabled for non-admin) → RBAC check server-side; triggers ReservationOverrideModal
Reservation banner → informational card explaining P1 semantics (reserved on RELEASED transition, RM stock only)
pending/active/released badge variants → map reservation.status to shadcn Badge variant
Count summary in tab label (w.reservations.length) → from aggregated count in WO detail query
Hardcoded 'Pending on RELEASE' badge text → next-intl keys under planning.wo.reservations namespace
Admin Release button → opens ReservationOverrideModal with LP data as prop

label: wo_sequencing_tab
translation_notes: Sequencing card with allergen profile + changeover cost → fetched from sequencing_queue table for this WO's assigned line
Position in queue (s.position / s.totalOnLine) → from sequencing_queue.position and COUNT on line
Before/After WO neighbors → from sequencing_queue ordered by position, take adjacent rows
Changeover cost badge (low/medium/high) → computed by allergen_sequencing_heuristic_v1 rule; stored in sequencing_queue.changeover_cost
Queue preview table (next 5) → Drizzle query on sequencing_queue ordered by position, limit 5 starting from current WO position - 1
Override active alert → from sequencing_queue.override_active + override_reason; Clear override → Server Action
Changeover cost → badge colors: low=green, medium=amber, high=red; map from enum
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under planning.wo.sequencing namespace

label: wo_history_tab
translation_notes: Status history table → from wo_status_history table ordered by timestamp asc; columns: from, to, timestamp, user, action, override_reason, context
context column rendered as JSON.stringify → use a Collapsible or Tooltip to show JSON without column overflow; consider JSONTree in production
WOPlanStatus badge for from/to columns → shared Badge component with status → variant map
Workflow rule link ('02-SETTINGS §7') → next/link to /settings/rules/wo_state_machine_v1
transition count badge → from .length of fetched history; displayed in tab label
Override reason column → amber color on non-null values; tooltip on truncated text
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under planning.wo.history namespace
No write operations here; this is a pure audit log view

label: plan_po_list
translation_notes: Tab counts (PLAN_POS.filter) → DB-side COUNT per status grouped; fetch counts and list in same RSC query
Filter bar (supplier, date range) → URL search params; Drizzle .where() with optional supplier_id and date range
Bulk actions (Release selected / Export / Cancel) → Server Actions; CSV export via route handler
D365 drift tag per row → po.d365_drift boolean column; Badge shown inline in PO number cell
KPI mini-cards (Open POs, Pending approval, Overdue, This month) → async RSC tiles; overdue from exp_date < now(); pending from COUNT WHERE status=pending_approval
Row click → navigation to /planning/purchase-orders/[id]
POStatus badge → shared Badge with status enum → variant map
Pagination → cursor-based via URL params

label: plan_po_detail
translation_notes: PO detail → Server Component fetching po + po_lines + status_history + d365 sync data in single Drizzle query with joins
Status-conditional action buttons (Edit/Cancel/Submit/Approve/Reject/View GRNs/Download PDF) → state machine map; each action is a Server Action with RBAC guard
Pending approval amber banner with inline Approve/Reject CTAs → shown when po.status=pending_approval; links to POApprovalModal
PO lines table with per-line progress bar (received/qty) → from po_lines table; received from grn_lines aggregation

Approval card (state/approver role/threshold/this PO total) → from po.approval_required + plan_settings.po.approval_threshold

Collapsible status history → accordioned by default on page load; Drizzle query on po_status_history

label: plan_to_list
translation_notes: Tab counts → DB-side COUNT per status grouped; from/to warehouse KPI tiles
Filter bar (from warehouse, to warehouse, priority, date range) → URL search params driving Drizzle .where() composition

KPI strip (Open TOs, In transit, Overdue, This week) → async RSC tiles with individual Drizzle COUNT queries

Create TO button → opens TOCreateModal; on success, router.refresh() to reload Server Component

label: plan_to_detail
translation_notes: TO detail → Server Component fetching to + to_lines + lps + status_history in single Drizzle query

TO lines table with per-line ship/receive progress bars → from to_lines with shipped/received aggregation

label: plan_gantt
translation_notes: DAY_W / HOUR_W pixel constants → in production these should be CSS custom properties or computed from container width (ResizeObserver); zoom in/out adjusts the multiplier
GANTT_BARS and GANTT_LINES globals → Drizzle query: WOs with planned_start/planned_end for the selected week + line filter; returned as serialized JSON from Server Component
Bar positioning (b.day * DAY_W + b.start * HOUR_W) → computed in client component from ISO datetime strings; day index = diff from week start, hour = hour-of-day
Allergen color band (gb-band CSS class) → map allergen family to design token color; allergen data joined from WO materials
Changeover markers → computed server-side from sequencing_queue; position from planned_start of each WO
Popover on bar click → shadcn Popover or custom absolute-positioned card; not a full Dialog since it should not block interaction
Bar conflict class (conflict: true) → from a capacity slot overlap query; greedy allocation P1 stub
SVG dependency arrows → simplified stub; production will use dagre layout for multi-line cross-lane arrows

label: plan_cascade_dag
translation_notes: CASCADE_DAG and CASCADE_EDGES globals → Drizzle query on cascade_edges table with full WO join; grouped by chain_id server-side
Chain list sidebar → left panel with chain-row items; activeChain URL search param for deep-link; selectedNode stored in client state

Layered DAG canvas → BACKLOG Q2: replace with react-flow in production with SVG directed edges, edge labels (qty + uom + to_stock badge), cycle-highlight; current CSS flexbox layers acceptable for P1 prototype
Availability dot on node (green/yellow/red/produced) → from WO material availability summary; computed server-side

Open full detail button → next/link to /planning/work-orders/[selectedNode.code]
known_bugs: Q2 in BACKLOG.md: cascade canvas is a layered list, not a true directed graph with SVG edges and edge labels; react-flow integration needed before production implementation

label: plan_reservations
translation_notes: PLAN_RESERVATIONS global → Drizzle query on lp_reservations with joins to WOs, LPs, materials; filtered by status (active/consumed/cancelled/admin_override)
Multi-filter bar (search, status, warehouse, WO status, reservation type) → URL search params; Drizzle .where() composition
Summary strip (active hard locks, LPs locked, fully committed LPs) → aggregate subquery counts; fully committed = LPs where reserved >= total_qty
Availability panel (right sidebar) → for selected product: from lp table where product_code = selectedProduct, FEFO sorted; net = total - reserved; over-committed alert when net < 0
Release button (admin only) → RBAC check; triggers ReservationOverrideModal with LP data as prop
Status badges (Active/Consumed/Cancelled/Admin override) → map reservation.status enum to Badge variant
Click row → navigate to WO detail (/planning/work-orders/[r.wo])
Export button → route handler streaming CSV of current filtered view

label: plan_sequencing
translation_notes: SEQ_QUEUE and SEQ_KPIS globals → Drizzle query on sequencing_queue filtered by line + date window; groups computed server-side by allergen_family
Drag handle (seq-drag ⋮⋮ icon) → wired to @dnd-kit/sortable in production for manual override; position updates via Server Action
Group headers (allergen family, row count, total hours) → computed from grouped queue rows; changeover cost estimated by rule
Before/after compare modal (inline in other-screens.jsx) → rendered as shadcn Dialog; uses SEQ_KPIS from server prop
Line selector → URL search param; page re-fetches sequencing_queue for selected line

Apply Sequencing button → opens SequencingApplyConfirmModal with queue + kpis as props
Override button per row → opens a per-WO override form; stores override in sequencing_queue.override_active + override_reason

label: plan_settings
translation_notes: 9-tab settings page → shadcn Tabs with URL hash or search param for deep-link; tab list rendered as vertical sidebar on desktop
Dirty state + unsaved banner → useFormState from react-hook-form with isDirty; unsaved-changes confirmation on navigation (useBeforeUnload)
Field components (Field, Toggle) → replace with shadcn FormField + Switch (Toggle) + Label; help text via FormDescription
Per-tab form state (general, po, to, wo, cascade, seq, d365, status, visibility) → split into separate React Hook Forms or a single nested form with sections
Save changes → single Server Action per tab section; validates entire section with zod; emits settings.updated outbox event
Status display table (editable labels, colors, icons) → inline-editable Table rows with react-hook-form useFieldArray
Field visibility table (RBAC toggles) → checkboxes matrix; required fields disabled; save via Server Action with server-side RBAC enforcement
D365 settings tab → cron expression validated with cron-parser; 'Test D365 connection' → async Server Action returning live status
known_bugs: Q5 in BACKLOG.md: ~30 additional settings screens (SET-040 through SET-100) not yet prototyped; blocks D365 end-to-end and Rules Registry browsing

label: plan_d365_queue
translation_notes: D365 trigger enabled gate (if !enabled → show disabled state) → Server Component reads plan_settings.d365.enabled; renders disabled gate page or full queue page
D365_PULL_HISTORY strip → from d365_pull_log table: last_run, so_count, draft_wo_count, errors; cached with short revalidation
Draft WOs table with expandable cascade chain rows → Drizzle query on wo where source=d365 and status=draft, joined with cascade_edges; expanded state is client-side via useExpandedRows
Pull errors section (collapsible) → from d365_pull_errors table; retry button → Server Action re-queues SO for processing
Review button → opens DraftWOReviewModal with WO data as prop; modal fetches review detail (materials, cascade chain) via Server Action
Filter bar (SO ref search, SO status, WO status, time range) → URL search params; Drizzle .where() with optional filters
Manual trigger button → Server Action that enqueues d365.so_pull job immediately; returns job status for optimistic feedback
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under planning.d365.queue namespace

label: release_wo_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal wrapper → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog with DialogContent/DialogHeader/DialogFooter
Local <select> for WO list → Server Component query from wo table filtered by status='DRAFT' AND bom_released=true, fed into shadcn Select
BOM snapshot preview card → dedicated BomSnapshotSummary server component reading frozen bom_snapshot row at release time
Inline date inputs → shadcn DateTimePicker or react-day-picker with controlled state
Operator assignment select → query from users WHERE certified_for_line=lineId, passed as prop from parent Server Component
Hardcoded labels (e.g. 'Releasing a WO…') → next-intl t('production.release_wo.info') keys

label: start_wo_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog with DialogContent, title via DialogHeader
Confirmation summary card (WO/Line/Operator/Planned) → Summary component reading WO detail from server, not passed as raw prop

Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys (e.g. 'production.start_wo.pin_help')

label: pause_line_modal
translation_notes: Local React.useState(cat) pill selector → shadcn ToggleGroup or RadioGroup to pick downtime 4P category
Dynamic sub-category list keyed by category → derive options from a downtime_categories lookup table query (or static enum config), rendered as shadcn Select

Textarea for reason → shadcn Textarea with zod .min(5) validation
'Notify maintenance' toggle → shadcn Switch, on=true triggers a maintenance_notification Server Action side-effect
On submit: Server Action creates downtime_event record, sets line status to PAUSED, pauses linked WO, emits line.paused outbox event

label: complete_wo_modal

known_bugs: BL-PROD-05: .btn-danger class missing from production.css / shared.css — HIGH priority fix needed before destructive confirmation UX is correct

label: over_consume_modal

label: waste_modal
translation_notes: Linked WO select → query active WOs on current line, default to current active WO, via Server Component prop

label: catch_weight_modal
translation_notes: Unit capture grid (14 filled / 10 pending) → driven by real catch_weight_captures table rows for the current LP, with live subscription via SSE or SWR polling

Running total / avg / variance computed client-side from capture array → move aggregation to server or at minimum memoize with useMemo
On submit: Server Action registers LP as finalized when unit count met, calculates actual weight, stores on lp_output.actual_weight_kg

label: scanner_modal
translation_notes: Three scanner deep-link items (Consume LP / Register output / Catch-weight) → generate real deep-link URLs with signed JWT containing WO id + line id + action type
window.Modal wrapper → Dialog with simple list layout
