known_bugs: BL-SCN-01: _shared/ScannerModal.jsx bottom-sheet primitive not yet built — current implementation is CSS-override approach

label: dlq_inspect_modal
translation_notes: DLQ[0] mock data → query d365_dlq table by event id passed as prop, loaded in Server Component
Metadata grid (Event/Attempts/Moved at/Last error) → shadcn DescriptionList or simple dl/dt/dd semantic HTML with tailwind
Raw error payload pre block → shadcn pre with syntax highlight or a CodeBlock component; actual payload stored as d365_dlq.last_error_payload JSONB
Retry push → Server Action re-enqueues the DLQ item, increments attempts counter, clears last_error at
Mark resolved → Server Action sets d365_dlq.status to RESOLVED_NO_PUSH, records resolved_by and resolved_at
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys; 'MES is source of truth' alert text → t('production.dlq.design_principle')
Correlation ID display → clickable link to structured log search (e.g. Datadog/Grafana) in production

label: resume_line_modal
translation_notes: Hardcoded downtime summary (23 min / Plant — Breakdown) → derive from open downtime_event record for the line, calculate duration server-side
Resolution note textarea → shadcn Textarea with zod .min(5) validation, stored on downtime_events.resolution_note
Operator PIN → same PIN verification pattern as other modals; sign-off stored on downtime_events.resumed_by_user_id + resumed_at
On submit: Server Action closes downtime_event (sets ended_at), sets line status to RUNNING, resumes linked WO, emits line.resumed event
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

label: changeover_gate_modal
translation_notes: Dual signature boxes (Shift Lead + Quality) → derive signer status from changeover_gate_signatures table; 'signed' state read from DB not local state
Quality signer select → query users WHERE role='QUALITY' AND factory=currentFactory, only active shift members
PIN input per signer → each validated server-side independently; both signatures stored as separate rows in changeover_gate_signatures
Gate number (sign gate 4) → parameterized from changeover_step record; step unlocks only when both signatures present (server-enforced)
'Sign & advance' disabled until Quality assigned → derive disabled state from server data (quality_signer_id IS NULL), not just client state
Hardcoded allergen context → pull from changeover.allergen_in / allergen_out fields
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys; emit changeover.gate_signed event on success

label: assign_crew_modal
translation_notes: SHIFT_CREW mock array → query shift_assignments JOIN users for current shift, returned as server prop
Operator select per line → query users WHERE line_certifications @> ARRAY[lineId] to show only certified operators (V-PROD-SHIFT-001)
Certification badge → derive from user.line_certifications array; unassigned badge if operator = null
Table layout → shadcn Table component (TableHeader/TableBody/TableRow/TableCell)
On submit: Server Action bulk-upserts shift_assignments rows, validates certification constraint server-side before save
Hardcoded operators list (T. Ziółkowski etc.) → live query from users table filtered by factory and shift availability

label: shift_start_modal
translation_notes: Local useState for pin/handover/crewOverride → useForm (react-hook-form) + zodResolver with schema: pin z.string().length(4).regex(/^\d+$/), handover z.string().min(10)
Shared Field primitive from _shared/modals.jsx → production FormField wrapper using shadcn FormItem/FormLabel/FormControl pattern
ReasonInput primitive → shadcn Textarea with character count, wired to form state via Controller
Previous shift handover read-only block → query shift_handovers WHERE shift_id=previousShiftId from Server Component, not hard-coded
Crew table with crewOverride state → same pattern as assign_crew_modal; merge overrides into shift_assignments on submit
V-PROD-SHIFT-001 unassigned critical line block → server-side guard in Server Action: reject if any critical line unassigned
On submit: Server Action creates shift_start_event, upserts shift_assignments, stores handover note in shift_handovers, emits shift.started event
BL-PROD-03: Currently hardcodes Factory-A — multi-plant operators need a plant picker field added to this modal
known_bugs: BL-PROD-03: Modal assumes single plant (Factory-A) — multi-plant operators need plant picker

label: shift_end_modal
translation_notes: Local useState for checks/handover/pin → useForm + zodResolver; check states from server reality not client-only booleans (e.g. open downtime check queries downtime_events)
Summary primitive (rows with label/value/emphasis) → shadcn Card with a dedicated ShiftSummary server component reading shift KPIs from aggregated view
Gate-check items (oee/wos/downtime/waste) → each gate queries real data: downtime_events for open check, waste_log for waste check; V-PROD-SHIFT-002 enforced server-side
ReasonInput for handover → shadcn Textarea min(10) via zod, stored as shift_handovers row
PIN verification → server-side hash check, stored as shift_end_event.signed_by_user_id + signed_at
On submit: Server Action closes shift, stores shift_end_event, saves handover note, calculates final shift KPIs, emits shift.ended event
Hardcoded shift stats (3 842 kg, 76.2% OEE etc.) → derive from real-time aggregation query on wo_events + downtime_events for shift window

label: oee_target_edit_modal
translation_notes: Local useState for a/p/q/line/effective/reason/role → useForm + zodResolver; role should come from session not local demo state
RBAC role gate (V-PROD-OEE-001: Plant Manager only) → read role from server session via auth() call in Server Action; block non-admin at API layer not just UI
Resulting OEE computation (a*p*q/10000) → keep client-side for instant feedback but re-validate on server before save
LINES map for line select → query lines table filtered by factory from Server Component, not LINES mock array
Effective date → shadcn DatePicker with min date = tomorrow (cannot backdate targets)
ReasonInput min(10) → shadcn Textarea with zod validation; stored in prod_oee_targets.change_reason
On submit: Server Action inserts into prod_oee_targets (effective_date, line_id, target_a, target_p, target_q, changed_by, reason); existing window closed
BL-PROD-04: Currently stores in memory — needs prod_oee_targets table with effective-date window for historic comparison
known_bugs: BL-PROD-04: OEE target edits stored in memory only — needs prod_oee_targets table with effective-date windowing

label: tweaks_panel
translation_notes: position:fixed inline style → shadcn Sheet (side='right') or Popover anchored to a toolbar button, not raw fixed positioning
tweaks object via props/setState → Zustand store or React Context for cross-component UI preferences; persist to localStorage or user_preferences table
Density / card layout / KPI accent selects → shadcn Select components; values drive CSS custom properties or tailwind class variants
Toggle inputs for banners/pulse-dot → shadcn Switch components; states read from preference store
This is a prototype-only devtools panel — in production, user preferences like density should be in a proper Settings page, not a floating panel

label: wo_list
translation_notes: WOS mock array filtered by status/search → Drizzle query with .where(and(eq(wo.status, tab), or(ilike(wo.code, search), ilike(wo.name, search)))) in a Server Component; tab='all' omits status filter
Status tab bar with counts → derive tab counts from a single GROUP BY status aggregation query to avoid N+1
Line + date range filter dropdowns → URL search params (?line=LINE-01&period=today) consumed by Server Component; shadcn Select triggers router.push()
WOStatus component (badge by status) → variant map: in_progress=green, paused=amber, ready=blue, completed=gray, draft=outline
Progress bar per row (consumed/planned) → shadcn Progress with computed value; pct capped at 100
Row click → navigates to /production/wo/[id] (WODetail page); action buttons stop propagation via e.stopPropagation()
Export button → Server Action streaming CSV response from same Drizzle query
Allergen gate badge → derived from wo.allergen_gate boolean field

label: wo_detail
translation_notes: WO_DETAIL mock object → Server Component fetching WO with relations: bomComponents, consumedLPs, outputs, coProducts, byProducts, wasteLog, history, downtime from Drizzle
Tab state (consumption/output/waste/downtime/genealogy/history) → URL-based tab via searchParams; shadcn Tabs component with TabsList/TabsTrigger/TabsContent
Over-consumption alert banner → render conditionally from wo.pendingOverConsumptions array; Approve/Reject buttons open respective modals (client components)
Progress bars for consumption and output → shadcn Progress; values computed from wo.consumed/plannedQty and wo.output/outputTarget
Action buttons (Pause/Waste/Catch-weight/Complete) → client-side button group opening modals; must check WO status server-side before showing
BOM snapshot badge → display wo.bomSnapshotVersion, link to Technical BOM detail view

label: consumption_tab
translation_notes: BOM components table (planned/consumed/remaining/progress) → Drizzle query: SELECT bom_components JOIN consumption_events WHERE wo_id=woId, aggregating consumed qty per component
Over-consumption flag per row (isOver, c.over) → derive from consumption_events.qty_consumed - bom_component.planned_qty; amber text + variance badge if positive
FEFO badge per row → from lp_consumption.fefo_compliant boolean; deviation badge shows reason from lp_consumption.fefo_deviation_reason
Auto-consumed badge → from bom_component.auto_consume boolean
LP consumption log sidebar → separate query: lp_consumptions WHERE wo_id=woId ORDER BY scanned_at DESC, rendered as a scrollable list
Progress bar per component → shadcn Progress value={pct}
Operator hints card (FEFO pick, batch fit, ETA) → computed server-side from remaining bom quantities + historical throughput rates; cacheable with short TTL
Scan next LP button → opens ScannerModal deep-link for consume action

label: output_tab
translation_notes: Primary output table → query lp_outputs WHERE wo_id=woId AND output_type='PRIMARY', joined to qa_samples for QA status
Co-products and by-products tables → separate queries from bom_co_products filtered by output_type, with registered qty from lp_outputs
Register output LP button → opens a RegisterOutputModal (not yet in prototype) that creates an lp_output record
QA status badge (Pending QA / Released) → from qa_samples.status field; link to QA module detail
Label column → link to label print action (Warehouse LP label print flow per BL-WH-04)
Catch-weight mode toggle button → sets line to catch-weight capture mode, opens CatchWeightModal; mode persisted on line_config.weighing_mode
Hardcoded LP-9001 / WO-2026-0042-OUT-001 → real data from lp_outputs table

label: genealogy_tab
translation_notes: Consumed inputs / Output LPs two-column tree → query lp_consumptions (backward trace) and lp_outputs (forward trace) for the WO in a single CTE genealogy query
Tree layout (tree-root / tree-branch / tree-node) → CSS grid or flexbox in production; consider react-flow for interactive genealogy if spec requires clickable nodes
Shipment links section → query shipment_lines WHERE lp_id IN (output lp ids) once LPs are allocated to shipments
Export for mock recall button → Server Action generating JSON from recursive genealogy CTE, streamed as file download
Forward/Backward toggle → two query directions: forward (WO→LPs→shipments) and backward (LP→batch→WO→consumed inputs); URL param ?direction=forward|backward
FEFO badge on consumed inputs → from lp_consumptions.fefo_compliant

label: history_tab
translation_notes: w.history mock array → query wo_events WHERE wo_id=woId ORDER BY occurred_at DESC; table is append-only (INSERT only, no UPDATE/DELETE)
Tx column → wo_events.tx_id UUID from the database transaction; link to audit log or D365 correlation ID
Export JSON button → Server Action streaming wo_events as JSON (NDJSON or JSON array); suitable for audit export
Actor column → wo_events.actor_name (denormalized) or JOIN to users table for display name
shadcn Table with sticky header for long event logs; paginate server-side if >100 rows
Hardcoded h.t / h.actor / h.event / h.tx → map from real wo_events columns: occurred_at, actor_name, event_type, tx_id

label: production_dashboard
translation_notes: LINES / EVENTS_FEED mock data → Server Component fetching live data: lines with active WO joined to wo_events (last 30 min) and downtime_events; use streaming with React Suspense for different KPI sections
KPI row (6 tiles) → each KPI is a separate async Server Component with its own data fetch; wrap in Suspense with skeleton fallback for independent loading
Attention ribbon (2 events need attention) → derive from lines WHERE status='DOWN' OR (status='CHANGEOVER' AND changeover.pending_signatures > 0); dismiss state via user_dismissed_alerts table
Lines grid → LineCard components rendered for each line in LINES array; grid layout via CSS grid (grid-cols-3 on desktop, cols-1 mobile)
Recent events feed → query wo_events + downtime_events last 30 min, merged and sorted by occurred_at; consider Server-Sent Events for live updates
Quick actions panel → static list of buttons triggering modals; no data fetch needed
Shift targets panel → query shift_kpi_summary view for current shift window; progress bars computed client-side from target vs actual
TV mode button → CSS class toggle adding fullscreen layout; target audience is plant floor displays (BL-OEE-06 reference)

label: line_card
translation_notes: line prop from LINES mock → Server Component receiving a line record from Drizzle query including active WO, operator, status, consumed/planned, downtime events
Status-conditional sections (down alert / changeover alert / allergen alert) → render each conditionally from line.status; keep in a single Client Component for low-latency interactivity
Progress bar with color by status → shadcn Progress; color via className variant (green/amber/red) driven by l.status
Operator avatar (opInit abbreviation) → derive from operator.display_name first+last initials; shadcn Avatar with fallback
Next WO chip → query wo WHERE line_id=lineId AND status='READY' ORDER BY planned_start LIMIT 1
Action buttons vary by status → client-side conditional rendering; all modal triggers are client interactions, line data is server-fetched
Allergen change warning → from line.nextWoAllergenChange boolean derived from WO-to-WO allergen diff

label: waste_analytics_screen
translation_notes: WASTE_PARETO / WASTE_TREND / WASTE_BY_LINE / WASTE_EVENTS mock data → Drizzle queries: GROUP BY category for pareto, daily bucket aggregation for trend, GROUP BY line for by-line, paginated event list
Hard-coded rollingPct/totalKg/target → rolling-14d window query: SELECT SUM(qty_kg) / SUM(wo.consumed_kg) * 100 FROM waste_events WHERE occurred_at >= NOW()-14d; BL-PROD-02 flags this as a known gap
Pareto bar chart (CSS .pareto-bar) → in production use a real charting library (Recharts/Victory) or server-rendered SVG; BACKLOG BL-RPT-02 recommends D3-shape
Trend sparkline (Spark component) → same charting migration; target line at 1.5% is a horizontal reference from prod_settings.waste_target_pct
catFilter / lineFilter local state → URL search params (?cat=Trim&line=LINE-01) enabling shareable filtered views; Server Component re-fetches on param change
Waste by line table → Drizzle query with GROUP BY line_id, JOIN to lines for name; highlight rows where pct > prod_settings.waste_alert_threshold
Export CSV button → Server Action streaming waste_events as CSV for selected date range and filters
known_bugs: BL-PROD-02: rolling % and totals hard-coded — needs rolling-14d window query from event store

label: line_detail
translation_notes: LINE_DETAIL mock data → Server Component fetching: line record, active WO, downtimeEvents for current shift, shiftLog events, yieldRolling hourly aggregation, OEE A/P/Q from oee_daily
Status ribbon (running/paused/down/changeover/idle) → derive rtext/rcolor from line.status enum; shadcn Alert variant or a dedicated StatusRibbon client component
5-tab layout (current WO / today's output / yield / downtime / OEE / shift log) → URL-based tabs via searchParams; shadcn Tabs
Today's output table (static rows in prototype) → Drizzle query from lp_outputs WHERE line_id=lineId AND registered_at::date = TODAY; BL-PROD-01 flags this as static
Yield rolling 4h chart (Spark component) → real hourly bucket aggregation from wo_events; replace Spark with Recharts AreaChart
OEE breakdown gauge ring (GaugeRing SVG) → use a Recharts RadialBarChart or a dedicated gauge library; A/P/Q formulas are documented in component comments
Live event stream sidebar → Server-Sent Events stream from /api/lines/[id]/events endpoint, replacing static d.events mock array
known_bugs: BL-PROD-01: LineDetail today-output table is static — real impl should pull from Warehouse LP registry filtered by line + date

label: oee_screen
translation_notes: plantA/plantP/plantQ hardcoded → query oee_daily WHERE date=TODAY AND scope='PLANT'; A/P/Q stored as separate columns
GaugeRing SVG primitive → replace with Recharts RadialBarChart or a dedicated gauge; zero-dep SVG approach noted in BL-OEE-09
OEE by line table (OEE_LINES mock) → Drizzle query GROUP BY line_id for current shift window; oeeColor derived from threshold constants from prod_settings
Spark sparklines per line (7-day trend) → query oee_daily for past 7 days per line; BL-OEE-01 flags incremental append via ?since=last_ts
Performance loss / Quality loss breakdown cards → query downtime_categories aggregation and qa_holds/rework_events for today
Period toggle (Today/7 days/30 days) → URL search params; adjusts query window in Server Component
Export button → Server Action generating OEE report PDF or CSV; BL-RPT-04 notes @media print needed for PDF
known_bugs: BL-OEE-01: Chart data is full refresh only — incremental append via ?since=last_ts not implemented
BL-OEE-09: Recharts vs inline SVG decision pending

label: downtime_screen
translation_notes: DOWNTIME mock array → Drizzle query from downtime_events with time-window filter (today/this week/30 days via URL param), ordered by started_at DESC
PARETO mock array → aggregation query: SELECT category, SUM(duration_min) as min, COUNT(*) as events FROM downtime_events WHERE ... GROUP BY category ORDER BY min DESC
Pareto bar chart → same charting migration as waste analytics (Recharts or D3); color by group (plant=red/process=amber/people=blue) matches 4P taxonomy
Distribution summary card (Plant/Process/People totals) → compute from same GROUP BY query, adding percentage of total
Event log table → paginated, search by reason/line/WO via URL params; source column auto vs manual from downtime_events.source enum
Search input + category filter → URL search params ?q=mixer&cat=Plant; Server Component re-fetches
Period toggle pills → URL search param ?period=today|week|month
Log downtime button → opens PauseLineModal (reuses existing pause flow)

label: production_shifts_screen
translation_notes: SHIFT_CREW mock → query shift_assignments JOIN users WHERE shift_id=currentShiftId, include line certifications for cert badge
Shift A line assignments table → shadcn Table; operator status (active/break/unassigned) from shift_assignments.status enum
Current WO per line → join to lines.active_wo_id for each assignment row
Shift handover notes → query shift_handovers WHERE factory_id=X ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10; textarea posts new note via Server Action to shift_handovers
Shift targets vs actual card → query shift_kpi_summary view for current shift_id
Re-assign individual operator button → inline trigger for AssignCrewModal with pre-selected line
Start/End shift buttons → open respective modals; disable End Shift if no active shift found

label: changeover_screen
translation_notes: Hardcoded 5 changeover steps → query changeover_steps WHERE changeover_id=X ORDER BY step_number; step status (done/in_progress/locked) from changeover_steps.status enum
Cleaning checklist items (14 of 18 done) → query changeover_checklist_items WHERE step_id=X; done/photo-required from checklist_item.completed and checklist_item.requires_photo
Photo upload per checklist item → file upload to blob storage, URL stored on changeover_checklist_items.photo_url; required=true blocks step completion
Dual sign-off section (step 4) → reads from changeover_gate_signatures; locked until all checklist items done
Done/In Progress/Locked step section styling → CSS border-left color keyed by step status; shadcn variant or tailwind class map
Allergen info (entering: Gluten, celery) → from changeover.allergen_profile JSONB field comparing prev WO allergens to next WO allergens
Release next WO button (locked) → enabled only when all steps done and dual sign-off complete; triggers ReleaseWoModal

label: analytics_screen
translation_notes: 4 KPI tiles (OEE/FPQ/yield/waste) → each is a separate async Server Component fetching from pre-computed analytics_kpi_summary view for selected period
OEE 7-day trend chart (Spark) → Recharts AreaChart or LineChart with daily oee_daily data points; replace Spark SVG placeholder
Yield by line bar chart (pareto-bar CSS) → Recharts BarChart with per-line yield; color green if >= target, amber if below
Top downtime drivers table → Drizzle query with GROUP BY category, line_id for past 30 days, sorted by total minutes DESC
Period toggle (Today/7d/30d/Custom) → URL search params; Custom triggers a DateRangePicker (shadcn Calendar-based) popover
Export PDF button → Server Action calling Puppeteer-based PDF generation route (BL-RPT-04: @media print stylesheet needed)
Hardcoded top driver data → real query from downtime_events aggregated with CTE; top_reason from MODE() aggregate or most frequent reason text
known_bugs: BL-RPT-04: @media print stylesheet for PDF export not yet built

label: dlq_screen
translation_notes: DLQ mock array → query d365_dlq WHERE status='OPEN' ORDER BY moved_to_dlq_at ASC for DLQ tab; resolved tab filters status='RESOLVED'; all events tab queries d365_push_events
dlq-health status strip (Connector/Queue depth/Events in DLQ/Oldest age) → Server Component fetching from d365_connector_health view; refresh on page load or via polling
Tab counts (DLQ 2 / Resolved 14 / All 312) → COUNT queries per tab, embedded in Server Component loader
Inspect button → opens DlqInspectModal with d row as data prop
Retry button (inline) → Server Action re-enqueuing single event; Retry all open → bulk Server Action
Error column max-width truncation → shadcn Tooltip showing full error on hover; link to full payload in DlqInspectModal
Design principle alert text → next-intl key; MES-as-source-of-truth language is important for operator training

label: production_settings_screen
translation_notes: Accordion set-card sections (Lines, 4P categories, Tolerances, Shifts, D365 push) → shadcn Accordion with AccordionItem/AccordionTrigger/AccordionContent
Lines table with inline inputs → each row's inputs are part of a form; on blur/save triggers Server Action updating lines table (nominal_cycle_kg_h, target_oee_pct, weighing_mode)
Downtime categories tags → query downtime_categories table; add button opens an inline form or a small creation modal; changes apply to future events only
Tolerances toggles and inputs → query/update prod_settings table per factory_id; toggle for waste_capture_mandatory and dual_signoff_allergen use shadcn Switch
Shift definitions table → query shifts table; edit per row triggers inline edit or a ShiftEditModal (not yet prototyped); rollover rule stored as shifts.rollover_rule enum
D365 push settings → query d365_connector_config; push_mode, retry_strategy, auto_dlq_after, alert_on_dlq all stored there; update via Server Action with Plant Manager RBAC guard
All settings require Plant Manager role → RBAC guard in every Server Action; non-PM users see disabled inputs with tooltip explaining required role
known_bugs: BL-PROD-04: OEE target edit (linked from this screen) stores targets in memory — needs prod_oee_targets table

label: hold_create_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog with fixed max-width and overlay
Local useState per field → useForm (react-hook-form) + zodResolver; schema validates reference FK existence server-side
QA_HOLD_REASONS mock array → Drizzle query from hold_reason_codes reference table in Server Component loader
reasonNotesRequired conditional → Zod .superRefine with cross-field validation on reason_notes min-10 rule
Priority pills + isCritical banner → shadcn RadioGroup or ToggleGroup; alert box → shadcn Alert variant='warning'
disposition/estRelease fields → shadcn Select + shadcn DatePicker (react-day-picker)
Add Server Action with role guard (quality_inspector or quality_lead); emit quality_hold_created outbox event on success
Hardcoded labels ('LP', 'Batch', etc.) → next-intl t() keys; SoD warning copy → i18n key with V-QA-HOLD-006 ref
known_bugs: BL-QA-07 — real-time spec search autocomplete for hold reference picker not implemented

label: quality_hold_release_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog; destructive action pattern needs red-bordered footer per MODAL-SCHEMA §4
sodBlock guard → server-side RBAC check comparing hold.created_by_user_id to session.userId; never trust client-only block
PIN masked input → virtual keypad component (BL-QA-06 notes plain input is inadequate; use on-screen digit buttons to defeat keyloggers)
SHA-256 hash reference → server generates signature_hash server-side on POST; client never computes it
Add Server Action with disposition != 'Pending' Zod check and SoD database assertion before commit
Emit quality_hold_released outbox event; immutable audit record inserted by DB trigger, not client
Summary component → shadcn dl/dt/dd pattern or Table with two columns; no separate primitive needed
Hardcoded user name/timestamp → server-injected from session and server clock; never trust client datetime
known_bugs: BL-QA-06 — plain masked PIN input; virtual keypad deferred

label: spec_sign_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog; checklist items → shadcn Checkbox list, disabled/read-only (server-computed pre-approval checks)
checks[] hardcoded → Server Action pre-flight: query DB to verify V-QA-SPEC-002 (all params have test_method), V-QA-SPEC-003 (min<=target<=max), V-QA-SPEC-005 (role=quality_lead)
PIN esign-block → shared ESignBlock server component; PIN verified via PBKDF2 match against stored user PIN hash
Allergen profile snapshot note → on approve Server Action: read allergen_profile from 03-Technical and snapshot JSON into spec record
Add immutability: after approval, spec status changes to 'active' and all fields locked; UI transitions to read-only SignedBanner
Hardcoded spec meta (product, version) → props from parent loader; no local state for read-only summary data
known_bugs: BL-QA-06 — plain PIN input; virtual keypad deferred

label: template_create_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal size='wide' → Dialog with wider max-width class; wide pattern needs explicit className override on DialogContent
Inline editable params table (add/remove rows) → react-hook-form useFieldArray for dynamic parameter list
params local state → useFieldArray; each row maps to { name, type } with shadcn Input and Badge for type display
Mock category select → reference data from inspection_template_categories table; load server-side as static prop
Save Template → Server Action upsert to inspection_templates; validate at least 1 param present (paramsValid)
Delete row button → useFieldArray remove(i); no server call until Save

label: sample_draw_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; AQL plan summary Summary rows → shadcn DescriptionList or read-only dl/dt/dd grid
AQL decision computed client-side (defects vs accept/reject) → mirror same logic server-side in Server Action; client preview only
defects state + decision alert → live Zod validation with watch() on defects field; conditional Alert variant green/amber/red
'NCR will be auto-created' banner → Server Action must trigger ncr_reports INSERT when decision='reject'; not a client concern
Sampling plan (plan.sampleSize, plan.accept, plan.reject) → loaded from sampling_plans table joined to inspection; never hardcoded
remaining = plan.sampleSize - insp.samplesTaken → computed server-side and passed as prop; input max attribute set from prop

label: ncr_create_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal size='wide' → Dialog with wide variant; dual-path conditional blocks (yield_issue / allergen_deviation) → useWatch on type field
Local useState per field → useForm + zodResolver with superRefine cross-path validation (allergenLink required if type=allergen_deviation)

yield details block → conditionally rendered FormSection; targetYield/actualYield/claim% → number inputs; claimValue = (targetYield - actualYield) / targetYield * affectedQty * price (server-computed)
Product/assignedTo selects → server-loaded option lists; product search should be autocomplete/combobox not plain select for large catalogs
Save as draft / Submit NCR → two Server Actions (saveDraft, submitNcr); submitNcr validates description.length >= 20 server-side
dueMap severity→hours → stored as rule V-QA-NCR-001 in rules registry; read from DB, not hardcoded in UI
Emit ncr_created outbox event on submit; auto-create hold if type=allergen_deviation per V-QA-NCR-004

label: ncr_close_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; dual-sign layout (isCritical grid 1fr 1fr) → two ESignBlock components conditionally rendered
Pre-close checklist (checks[]) → server-side pre-flight in Server Action: query rootCause, immediateAction, linked holds status; fail = 422 with error details
V-QA-NCR-006 dual sign → Server Action enforces: critical NCRs require two distinct user_id values (qa_pin user + pm_pin user); not client-validated
rootCauseCategory select → reference data from ncr_root_cause_categories table
On close: status → 'closed', closedAt = server timestamp, signature_hash stored; record becomes immutable (row-level trigger)
Emit ncr_closed outbox event; any linked holds auto-updated if disposition still 'Pending'
Both PIN blocks → shared ESignBlock component with user context prop; second signer PIN must be a different session user (Production Manager)
known_bugs: BL-QA-06 — plain PIN input; virtual keypad deferred

label: ccp_reading_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; CCP select with optgroup → shadcn Select or Combobox grouped by HACCP plan
withinLimits/outOfLimits real-time computation → useWatch on value field + server-fetched ccpDef limits; never trust client-only limit check
Alert color conditional (green/red) → shadcn Alert with variant prop driven by server-validated result from Server Action preview endpoint
hazardSignRequired (biological/allergen) → e-sign block conditionally rendered; PIN verified server-side via PBKDF2; V-QA-CCP-005
Auto-create NCR + auto-hold on out-of-limits → Server Action side-effect: if !withinLimits → INSERT ncr_reports draft + INSERT quality_holds
Measured value + unit display → load ccpDef from ccp_definitions table in Server Component; pass as prop to client modal
WO link optional field → FK check against work_orders; async validation on blur preferred
known_bugs: BL-QA-06 — plain PIN input

label: ccp_deviation_log_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; CCP select → shadcn Select; severity override auto-computed from hazard_type → server-side derived field, not client select
corrective action ReasonInput (min 10) → Textarea + Zod min(10) validation with character counter
Linked monitoring record → FK search to ccp_monitoring_records; implement as async Combobox with debounced search
signReq (biological/allergen) → e-sign block conditional; add Server Action guard matching same rule as ccp_reading_modal
Auto-severity mapping (biological/allergen→critical, chemical/physical→major) → DB rule, not hardcoded enum in UI
Emit ccp_deviation_logged outbox event; link to related ccp_monitoring_record if provided
known_bugs: BL-QA-06 — plain PIN input

label: esign_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal size='sm' → Dialog with sm variant; generic e-sign primitive shared across all signing flows in quality module
Verify PIN button with simulated 700ms delay → real Server Action POST /api/auth/verify-pin returns {valid: bool}; use optimistic UI with loading spinner
PIN verification state (verified) → server response drives enabled state of Sign button; do not allow Sign without server confirmation
meaning prop → drives audit log signature_meaning field; never computed client-side; passed from parent action context
SHA-256 hash note → server computes hash(user_id || iso_timestamp || record_content); stored in esignatures table; client never touches hash
BL-QA-06 — replace plain <input type='password'> with virtual numeric keypad to defeat keyloggers (medium priority)
known_bugs: BL-QA-06 — plain PIN input; virtual keypad deferred (medium priority)

label: allergen_dual_sign_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; ATP gate check (atpRlu > atpThreshold) → server pre-flight: query allergen_changeover_validations.atp_rlu; block flag returned to client
approveBlocked ATP override checkbox + justification → Zod conditional superRefine: override requires overrideJust.length >= 10; override event is audit-logged separately
First signer displayed (recorded) → read-only from DB; second signer PIN → ESignBlock with Quality Lead role guard
Reject gate button → separate Server Action setting status='rejected' with reject_reason; also audit-logged
EU FIC 1169/2011 + Reg 2021/382 reference → regulation tags stored per gate record in DB; display from data not hardcoded
Allergen delta display (removed/added) → computed from gate record's allergens_removed[] / allergens_added[] JSON arrays in DB
Emit allergen_gate_approved or allergen_gate_rejected outbox event; blocked approval emits allergen_gate_override_approved with justification
known_bugs: BL-QA-06 — plain PIN input

label: audit_export_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; async prepare button with 1.2s mock delay → real streaming export via Next.js Route Handler (GET /api/quality/audit/export) with chunked response
Format pills (CSV/JSON) → shadcn RadioGroup or ToggleGroup; format drives Accept header on export request
Scope/user selects → filter params forwarded to Drizzle query on quality_audit_log; validate date range server-side (max 365d range)
Export-is-itself-an-audit-event note → Server Action or Route Handler inserts audit record for the export operation before streaming data
Download link on ready state → presigned S3/R2 URL or direct attachment response; never embed raw data in JSON response body for large exports
BRCGS Issue 10 §3.11.1 reference → regulatory tag from DB config, not hardcoded string

label: delete_with_reason_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal size='sm' → Dialog sm; destructive pattern: Delete button uses shadcn Button variant='destructive'
Reason min 10 chars → Zod min(10) + character counter; reason stored in audit log before DELETE
Server Action: validate entity is in a deletable state (draft-only for NCR per V-QA-NCR-005); active/signed records must reject with 409
Audit trail INSERT before DELETE → DB trigger or explicit Server Action step; reason_for_deletion stored in quality_audit_log.notes
entity/id props → typed discriminated union prop to support multiple deletable entity types (NCR, draft inspection, draft spec)

label: inspection_assign_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog default size; inspector select → load from users table filtered by role IN ('quality_inspector','quality_lead') in Server Component
Summary rows → read-only dl/dt/dd or shadcn Card with key-value pairs; inspection data passed as prop from parent list row
Priority override select → Server Action updates quality_inspections.priority; emit inspection_assigned outbox event
Notes textarea → stored in inspection record notes field; optional, no min length
Assign button → Server Action sets assigned_to_user_id and status='assigned'; validation: inspector must exist and have QA role

label: qa_dashboard
translation_notes: QA_KPIS mock array → Server Component: parallel Drizzle queries for open holds count, open NCRs count, overdue inspections, CCP compliance %; use Promise.all
KPI row (6 cards) → reusable KpiCard server component (label, value, sub, accent variant, onClick nav); 6-col CSS grid
Critical Alerts panel → server query: quality_alerts view or materialized view joining holds+NCRs+CCPs where severity='critical' and NOT dismissed; dismiss state stored per user in user_preferences
Dismissed set (local useState) → per-user dismissed_alerts stored in DB; dismiss action = Server Action updating user_dismissed_alerts
Tabbed recent records (Inspections/NCRs/HACCP) → shadcn Tabs + server-fetched data per tab; lazy-load tab content with Suspense
Auto-refresh (60s) note → implement via Next.js revalidate tag or client-side SWR with 60s interval; avoid polling in production
Quick actions bar → always-visible sticky footer buttons; openModal calls → URL-based modal state (searchParams) preferred over prop drilling
Role-based tab/action visibility → read role from session in Server Component; conditionally render tabs and action buttons

label: ncr_list
translation_notes: Client-side filter (status/severity/type/search) → URL searchParams driven; Server Component receives params and passes to Drizzle WHERE clause
Kanban-strip (draft/open/investigating/closed counts) → server aggregation query GROUP BY status; click filters the table via router.push with searchParam
Bulk selection (selected Set) → client state only for UI; bulk export → Server Action or Route Handler streaming CSV; bulk assign → Server Action with array of NCR IDs
Overdue highlight (row-overdue class) → computed server-side: response_due_at < now(); pass as row prop; CSS class applied conditionally
KPI row (4 cards) → same server query as kanban strip; combine into single aggregation query with COUNT FILTER
Pagination → implement cursor-based pagination with shadcn pagination; server query uses LIMIT/OFFSET or keyset pagination
Export button → Route Handler GET /api/quality/ncr/export with same filter params; streams CSV
Hardcoded 'Avg resolution 2.8d' → server AVG(closed_at - detected_at) WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL in rolling 30d window

label: ncr_detail
translation_notes: Two-column layout (main + sidebar) → CSS grid 1fr 380px; sticky action bar at bottom → shadcn sticky footer pattern with safe-area-inset
Root cause textarea (editable when not closed) → optimistic local mutation + Server Action autosave on blur; field locked when isClosed
Pre-close checklist in modal (checks[]) → server pre-flight; but NCR detail also shows investigation state → linked holds status needs live query
CAPA section P2 placeholder → shadcn Card with opacity-50 + disabled overlay; link to future CAPA module (Epic 8G per BL-QA-01)
Activity timeline → q-timeline → shadcn Timeline or custom ul with dot indicators; events from ncr_events table ordered by created_at DESC
Linked records sidebar (hold/inspection/CCP deviation/complaint) → FK lookups; each link navigates to respective detail page
Status workflow sidebar → server-driven state machine; Next/Close buttons trigger Server Actions mapped to state transitions
SignedBanner (immutable record) → shadcn Alert variant='success' with lock icon; shown when status='closed'

label: incoming_inspection_list
translation_notes: Status tabs (all/pending/assigned/in_progress/completed/cancelled) → shadcn Tabs backed by URL searchParam; each tab count from server aggregation
Client filter (status/assigned/priority/date) → URL searchParams; Server Component passes to Drizzle WHERE clause with AND chaining
Overdue warning banner → server query: count WHERE urgency='overdue' AND status NOT IN ('completed','cancelled'); shown conditionally
Row actions (Assign/Start/View) → inline buttons; Assign opens inspection_assign_modal; Start navigates to detail; View links to detail
GRN/PO dual display in cell → two-line cell layout; GRN is FK to grn_receipts table; PO is FK to purchase_orders
Sampling plan column → join to sampling_plans table; display plan code
Export button → Route Handler streaming CSV with same filter params
Pagination → cursor-based with LIMIT; table likely large in production

label: inspection_detail
translation_notes: Measurements table with inline numeric inputs → react-hook-form useFieldArray; auto-result computation (pass/fail/pending) on value change via useWatch + Zod transform
updateMeasured with result auto-computation → server-side result validation: pass if min<=value<=max per spec parameter; client preview only
Overall result banner (overallResult: pass/fail/cond/pending) → derived from server response after submit; client shows optimistic preview
Fail reason block (conditional) → shadcn Select for reason code + Textarea for notes; V-QA-INSP-006 validation server-side
Auto-NCR creation banner → note to user; actual NCR INSERT happens in Server Action on submit (not client-side)
Right sidebar (GRN/Product/Spec/SamplingPlan/LPs) → Server Component data loaded once; no client state; FK joins to grn_receipts, products, specs, sampling_plans, lps
Action bar submit buttons (pass/fail/cond) → each triggers openModal('eSign') with meaning prop; after e-sign confirmation, Server Action finalizes inspection
Signed banner (isSigned) → show when inspection.signed_at IS NOT NULL; record locked; action bar hidden

label: holds_list
translation_notes: Status tabs (active/all/open/investigating/released/quarantined) → shadcn Tabs with URL searchParam; active tab = composite filter activeStates
Client-side filter (priority/refType/search) → URL searchParams to Server Component; Drizzle WHERE with AND chaining
Bulk selection (selected Set) → client-only for UI; bulk release → Server Action array; RBAC: only quality_lead role can release
KPI strip (open/investigating/avgAge/releasedToday) → single aggregation query with multiple COUNT/AVG expressions
overdue detection (estRelease < today AND active) → computed server-side; pass as boolean prop per row
Release button inline → opens hold_release_modal with row data; RBAC check: canRelease = role=quality_lead from session
Empty state with CTA → shadcn empty state pattern with illustration; 'Create Hold' button links to hold_create_modal
Export CSV → Route Handler with same filter params and streaming response

label: hold_detail
translation_notes: Two-column layout (main content + sidebar) → CSS grid or shadcn ResizablePanel; sidebar contains linked records + actions
Held items table → Drizzle query: quality_hold_items JOIN lps; partial release per item → Server Action with item_id + partial qty
Activity log tab (q-timeline) → events from quality_hold_events table; shadcn Timeline or custom ul with dot connectors
Linked records (NCR/source inspection) → FK links with navigation on click; lazy load linked record summary
Release Hold button in sidebar → RBAC guard (quality_lead only); blocked if same user created hold (SoD V-QA-HOLD-006)
SignedBanner for released holds → Alert with immutable record notice; download audit PDF → Server Action generating PDF from record
activeStates_includes helper → DB-level: query WHERE status = ANY(ARRAY['open','investigating','escalated']); do not replicate in UI
Hold context card (reference/product/reason/category/disposition) → all from DB; no local state needed

label: specs_list
translation_notes: Client filter (status/appliesTo/search) → URL searchParams; Drizzle WHERE: status, applies_to, product ILIKE search
expiringSoon highlight → server-side: eff_until < now() + interval '30 days' AND status='active'; pass as boolean prop
isSuperseded opacity and strikethrough → CSS class from prop; version strikethrough = text-decoration-line: line-through
RegTags component → reusable Badge list from spec.regs array; each reg tag is a DB-stored string array column
Approved by / approvedAt two-line cell → JOIN to users table on approved_by_user_id; display name + ISO datetime
params/critical counts → from spec_parameters aggregate: COUNT(*), COUNT(*) FILTER WHERE critical=true
Create Specification button → navigate to spec wizard page (QA-003a); not a modal
View action → navigate to spec detail page (QA-003b)

label: spec_wizard
translation_notes: 3-step wizard (header/params/review) → shadcn Stepper or custom step indicator; step state managed by URL searchParam (step=1/2/3) for back-navigation safety
Header step → useForm for product/specCode/appliesTo/effFrom/effUntil/regs/refDocs/notes; spec_code uniqueness validated async on blur via Server Action
Params step → useFieldArray for dynamic parameter list; add-parameter side panel → form within form; min<=max validation in Zod superRefine
Review step → read-only Summary + parameters table; Submit for approval → Server Action upserts spec with status='draft'; Approve immediately → opens spec_sign_modal
regs Set (toggleReg) → shadcn MultiSelect or ToggleGroup; regs stored as text[] in DB column
FA product allergen profile note (FA prefix check) → server-side allergen snapshot on approval, not on product selection; remove client-side prefix check in production
Stepper completed state → shadcn Step with 'completed' variant; back navigation must preserve form state (use URL state or sessionStorage)
Version auto-set to 'v1' on create → server increments version on clone; client never computes version

label: spec_detail
translation_notes: Two-column layout (main + sidebar) → CSS grid or shadcn two-column page; sidebar shows signature state + regulatory notes
Allergen profile snapshot grid → allergen_grid CSS → shadcn Grid; read from spec_allergen_profile JSON snapshot column; present/absent badge variant
Parameters table → read-only; columns: name/type/target/min/max/unit/method/critical; critical rows highlighted with CSS class
SignedBanner → Alert with lock icon; spec.approved_at + approved_by joined from users table; immutable after approval
Clone to new version button → Server Action: duplicate spec record with version+1 and status='draft'; navigate to new spec wizard edit mode
Approve Specification button (under_review) → opens spec_sign_modal; only visible to quality_lead role
RegTags component → reusable Badge list; regulations stored as text[] in DB
Download PDF → Route Handler generating PDF from spec data (puppeteer/pdf-lib); stream as attachment

label: haccp_plans
translation_notes: haccp-layout (tree + detail) → CSS grid sidebar+main; tree = shadcn NavigationMenu or custom ul with L0/L1 indent levels
Plan tree (HACCP plans + nested CCPs) → server-loaded: SELECT * FROM haccp_plans LEFT JOIN ccps ON plan_id; tree rendered server-side
CCP card (spark dots for readings) → ccp-spark → inline SVG dots or recharts dot series; pass/fail color from within_limits bool
Recent readings count + deviations count → server-side aggregation per CCP: COUNT(*) and COUNT(*) FILTER WHERE !within_limits
Approve Plan (e-sign) → opens esign_modal with meaning='approved'; Server Action: updates haccp_plans.status='active', approved_by, approved_at
Edit CCP / New HACCP Plan buttons → navigate to dedicated edit pages or open modals (not in prototype scope; mark as P2)
Reading timeline sparkline → prototype uses CSS dots; production: recharts LineChart or tiny SVG path with D3 scale
ISO 22000 / Codex HACCP regulation tags → stored per plan in DB regs field; not hardcoded

label: ccp_monitoring
translation_notes: KPI strip (activeCCPs/compliance/deviations) → server aggregation: JOIN ccp_monitoring_records with ccps; compliance = pass_count/total_count for today
allReadings flatMap → Drizzle query: SELECT * FROM ccp_monitoring_records JOIN ccps JOIN haccp_plans ORDER BY recorded_at DESC with date filter
Timeline chart (ccp-chart-area with dots) → recharts ScatterChart or ResponsiveContainer with dots colored by within_limits; critical limit band = ReferenceArea
Chart CCP selector → controls which CCP's readings are charted; server-fetch readings for selected CCP on filter change (SWR or server action)
Date range filter + CCP/plan selects → URL searchParams; server query respects all filters
Deviations 24h KPI → server COUNT WHERE within_limits=false AND recorded_at > now() - interval '24 hours'
Compliance % → server: COUNT FILTER WHERE within_limits=true / COUNT(*) for today; never client-computed
Export CSV → Route Handler with same filter params; includes signature_hash column for audit trail

label: ccp_deviations
translation_notes: QA_DEVIATIONS mock → Drizzle query on ccp_deviation_records table JOIN ccps JOIN ncr_reports; sorted by recorded_at DESC
openCount / actionPending / resolvedToday → server aggregation: COUNT with conditional filters; single query with multiple expressions
Sign off button → opens esign_modal with meaning='witnessed'; Server Action updates deviation.signed_at and signed_by_user_id
Add action button → opens inline edit or small modal with corrective action textarea; Server Action updates corrective_action field
Linked NCR column → FK to ncr_reports.id; display as link navigating to NCR detail; 'Auto-created' badge if ncr.source='auto'
row-major class for missing corrective action → computed server-side: correctiveAction IS NULL; pass as boolean prop
Filter bar (hazard/CCP/severity/status/date) → URL searchParams; Drizzle WHERE with AND chaining; status enum maps to signed_at IS NULL vs IS NOT NULL
HazardBadge component → shadcn Badge with variant based on hazard_type enum (biological=red, chemical=amber, physical=slate, allergen=red)

label: allergen_gates
translation_notes: QA_ALLERGEN_GATES mock → Drizzle query on allergen_changeover_validations table JOIN work_orders (woFrom/woTo) JOIN users (firstSigner/secondSigner)
Right-side drawer (drawer-side) → shadcn Sheet component with side='right'; drawer body shows cleaning checklist + signatures + action buttons
Cleaning checklist in drawer → q-checklist → static ul with tick/cross icons; checklist stored as JSON in gate record, not hardcoded
ATP threshold comparison → atpRlu and atpThreshold from DB; highlight in red if exceeds; never recompute threshold in UI
pending2nd/approvedToday/rejected KPI strip → server aggregation: COUNT GROUP BY status for status IN ('pending_second_sign','approved','rejected')
Allergen delta display (removed/added badge arrays) → stored as text[] in allergens_removed + allergens_added columns; render each as Badge
Sign (2nd) button → RBAC: role=quality_lead AND status='pending_second_sign'; opens allergen_dual_sign_modal
Download evidence PDF → Route Handler generating PDF with cleaning checklist + both signatures + ATP result; BRCGS audit artifact

label: qa_templates
translation_notes: gallery-grid card layout → CSS grid with auto-fill; each card = shadcn Card with category badge, parameter preview, metadata footer
QA_TEMPLATES mock → Drizzle query on inspection_templates table with params count + preview array (first 4 param names)
Category filter pills → URL searchParam; server-side WHERE category = ? filter on inspection_templates
Use in spec button → should navigate to spec wizard with template pre-populated (templateId URL param); not yet implemented in prototype
Edit button → opens template_create_modal with template data as prop
params count + preview → aggregate query: COUNT param rows + array_agg(name) LIMIT 4 from inspection_template_params table
createdBy/updated → JOIN users; format updated timestamp with date-fns or Intl.DateTimeFormat

label: sampling_plans
translation_notes: QA_SAMPLING_PLANS mock → Drizzle query on sampling_plans table; filter by type, status, applies_to via URL searchParams
Filter pills (type/status/applies_to) → shadcn ToggleGroup or pill buttons backed by URL searchParam state
Table columns (lotMin-lotMax, sampleSize, accept, reject) → read-only numeric display; num mono class → font-mono text-right
Edit button → opens inline edit modal or navigates to edit page; 'samplingCreate' modal referenced but not in prototype scope; build as simple crud-form-with-validation modal
ISO 2859-1 / MIL-STD-105E info box → shadcn Alert variant='info'; external link to Wikipedia opens in new tab
Status badge → active/archived enum; StatusBadge shared component → shadcn Badge with variant map
Type badge (iso2859/ansi_z14/custom) → Badge; type stored in DB not hardcoded

label: audit_trail
translation_notes: QA_AUDIT mock → Drizzle query on quality_audit_log table (immutable, insert-only); filter by table, op, user, search, date range via URL searchParams
Expandable rows (expanded Set) → collapsible detail row pattern; use shadcn Collapsible or table row span with transition
audit-diff (before/after JSON) → two-column diff display; old_data / new_data JSONB columns; shadcn ScrollArea for long diffs; syntax highlight with Prism or shiki
SIGN event inline signature detail → read from esignatures table JOIN on record_id; display signature_hash truncated with copy button
Operation filter pills (INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/SIGN/RELEASE/APPROVE/CLOSE) → Set-based filter → WHERE op = ANY(ARRAY[...params]); empty set = all ops
Table selector → enum of auditable tables; map to actual DB table names for WHERE clause
Export CSV/JSON buttons → Route Handler GET /api/quality/audit/export with same filter params; streams response; export itself is audit-logged
Immutability enforcement → no edit/delete actions on this table; rows have no action column except Expand; BRCGS §3.11.1 7-year retention

label: qa_settings
translation_notes: 5-tab settings page (general/regulations/notifications/retention/rules) → shadcn Tabs backed by URL searchParam; each tab = Server Component with its own data loader
General tab: hold reason duration table → inline editable input per row; bulk save via Server Action (array of {code, defaultDuration}); RBAC: quality_lead only
Regulations tab: checkbox matrix → shadcn Checkbox list; active presets stored in tenant_settings.quality_regulations text[] column
Notifications tab: event × channel matrix → each cell is Checkbox; stored in notification_settings table with (event_key, channel, enabled) rows
Retention tab: read-only display (note in prototype: 'cannot change from UI') → Server Component only; no form; admin contact note
Rules tab: DSL rules read-only table → query from rule_registry table; links to 02-Settings Rule Registry; batch_release_gate_v1 shown with P2 badge + opacity
All settings changes → Server Action with role guard (quality_lead or admin); optimistic UI updates with useTransition
CCP deviation escalation delay (minutes) field → stored in tenant_settings.ccp_escalation_delay_minutes; validated 0-3600 range

label: reporting_export_report_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal wrapper → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog + DialogContent with size variants via cn()
Local useState for fmt/delivery/submitting/error → useForm (react-hook-form) + zodResolver; async submit → Server Action with FormData
setTimeout mock export → real Server Action calling storage presigned URL or email queue (Resend), emitting outbox event on success
Hardcoded rowEstimate threshold checks (warn >500, block >10000) → server-validated limits from RPT_SETTINGS.exportLimits (V-RPT-EXPORT-5/6)
Inline radio group for format → RadioGroup + RadioGroupItem from shadcn; disabled XLSX option keeps badge-gray disabled state
Conditional email Field → controlled show/hide via watch('delivery') in useForm; validate email with zod .email()
Alert boxes (alert-red, alert-blue, alert-amber) → shadcn Alert + AlertDescription with variant prop
Hardcoded labels → next-intl t('reporting.export.*') keys

label: save_preset_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog + DialogContent; edit vs create mode passed as prop drives title and initial field values via defaultValues in useForm
Duplicate-name check (dup = name === hardcoded string) → server-side uniqueness check in Server Action; optimistic client zod .refine() for UX feedback
Filter snapshot chip list → read active searchParams from URL (Next.js useSearchParams) serialised into preset JSON; chips rendered with shadcn Badge variant='secondary'
Visibility radio (me/team) → RadioGroup; persisted as enum column on saved_filter_presets table with RBAC guard (only Manager/Admin can set team)
tooLong check (>60 chars) → zod z.string().max(60) client+server; maxLength={80} on input is a soft guard only
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

label: schedule_report_modal
translation_notes: window.Stepper primitive → custom Stepper built with shadcn Steps or a simple ol/li with Tailwind classes; completed Set tracks visited steps
Two-step local state (step / completed) → useReducer or React Context; step state could also live in URL searchParams for deep-linkable wizard
Cadence select + conditional day-of-week checkboxes → FormField controlled by watch('cadence'); day-of-week becomes a multi-select with Toggle from shadcn
Recipient tag-input (onKeyDown Enter) → react-email-autocomplete or Combobox + Badge chip pattern; validate each entry with zod .email()
Subject template preview → computed via string interpolation from watch values; in production use a safe template renderer (e.g. mustache)
Schedule activation → Server Action creates scheduled_reports row + registers cron in pg_cron (or Trigger.dev job); emits outbox event
Phase 2 badge on modal title signals deferred feature; production RBAC guard: require reporting.scheduled_delivery feature flag ON
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

label: share_report_modal
translation_notes: navigator.clipboard.writeText → same API in production; wrap in try/catch + fallback execCommand for older browsers; show Toast (Sonner) on copy success
Hardcoded URL → generated server-side as signed URL with expiry stored in shared_report_links table; link expiry column driven by select value
'Require Login' toggle → checkbox controls requires_auth boolean; regulatory dashboard IDs (QC Holds, Inventory Aging) are blocked from unauthenticated sharing via RBAC rule
Alert info box about external sharing → driven by a domain rule (report_share_gate_v1) evaluated server-side; client shows read-only notice
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

label: reporting_delete_confirm_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal size='sm' → Dialog with max-w-sm DialogContent; destructive pattern: btn-danger → Button variant='destructive'
d.kind prop drives warning text (preset vs schedule) → pass via modal data prop; production Server Action branches on entity type
Audit log note ('logged with user and timestamp') → Server Action must INSERT into audit_log table with user_id from session + timestamp; not just UI text
Known cross-system: BL-PROD-05 in BACKLOG.md — btn-danger class missing from shared.css; ensure Button variant='destructive' maps to correct Tailwind tokens in production
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys
known_bugs: BL-PROD-05: .btn-danger missing from _shared/shared.css — destructive confirms fall back to primary styling

label: error_log_modal
translation_notes: window.Summary primitive (key-value rows) → custom dl/dt/dd or Table without headers; consider shadcn Table for consistency
Pre-formatted error message block → pre tag with overflow-auto; in production fetch from export_error_log table by export_id
Retry Export button → re-triggers the original export Server Action with same parameters; needs idempotency key to avoid duplicate jobs
Error code (PDF_TIMEOUT / V-RPT-EXPORT-7) → enum in export_error_codes table; 'Suggested action' text derived from code lookup, not hardcoded
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

label: regulatory_signoff_modal
translation_notes: PIN input (type='password', letterSpacing) → masked Input; in production PIN verification must be server-side: compare bcrypt hash stored against user profile, never send plain PIN over network
Lockout after 3 attempts (attempts state) → server-side attempt counter with exponential backoff + account lock; client state alone is bypassable
Summary rows (SHA-256, record count, regulation) → server-computed before modal opens; SHA-256 must be the actual hash of the export payload, embedded in PDF footer
Declaration text (BRCGS Issue 10 §3.4, 7-year retention) → from regulatory_requirements table keyed by regulation code; must be immutable after sign-off
On successful sign → Server Action creates regulatory_signoffs record (user_id, export_id, regulation_ref, sha256, signed_at) + triggers PDF generation
BL-QA-06 cross-reference: virtual-keypad PIN anti-keylogger flagged as Medium in BACKLOG.md — implement for production
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

label: refresh_confirm_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal size='sm' → Dialog max-w-sm; non-destructive confirm pattern — Button variant='default' not 'destructive'
setTimeout mock (1400ms) → Server Action calling REFRESH MATERIALIZED VIEW CONCURRENTLY via Drizzle raw SQL; view name passed as validated enum, never interpolated directly
Loading state on both buttons during refresh → useTransition (isPending) from React 19 or Server Action pending state; disable both Cancel + Refresh buttons while pending
Domain ref DS-0012 → link to internal data-sources registry; production shows last_refresh timestamp from pg_stat_user_tables or a dedicated mv_refresh_log
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

label: recipient_group_modal
translation_notes: Member list table with Remove action → shadcn Table with DataTable pattern; member rows from report_recipient_groups join users; Remove calls Server Action to delete membership row
Email/name search input → Combobox (shadcn) with server-side user search (Drizzle ilike query); debounced 300ms
Group Name field → zod z.string().min(1).max(80); uniqueness checked server-side in Server Action
Table inside modal (members) → acceptable for small lists (<20); if groups can be large, replace with virtualized list (TanStack Virtual)
Save Group → Server Action upserts recipient_groups + recipient_group_members rows; emits outbox event
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

label: run_now_confirm_modal
translation_notes: Simple confirm with schedule name + recipient count → Dialog max-w-sm; data passed via modal context/props
