Pagination (50/25/100 per page) → use cursor-based pagination with take/skip in Drizzle, page param in URL
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.so.list.*

label: so_detail_page
translation_notes: SH_SO_DETAIL static → Server Component loading SO with all relations: lines, allocations, holds, picks, shipments, history via Drizzle
Tab state (lines/allocation/holds/picks/packs/documents/history) → URL hash or search param ?tab=lines for deep-linking and browser back
hasAllergenConflict client-side check → pre-compute in loader using allergen_cascade_v1, pass as boolean prop
canConfirm/canAllocate/canCancel status guards → derive from so.status on server, pass capability flags as props for conditional button rendering
Allocation tab: Ltree path display → render ltree string as breadcrumb chips /components/shared/LtreePath
History tab: full audit log → query shipping_audit_log filtered by entity_id=so_id, export CSV via Server Action
Documents tab placeholder → link to doc_hub filtered by so_id
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.so.detail.*

label: allocation_global_page
translation_notes: SH_ALLOC_GLOBAL static rows → Drizzle query: sales_order_lines LEFT JOIN so_allocations, compute status (full/short/none/hold) in SQL CASE WHEN
KPI tiles (fully allocated/short/not allocated/on hold) → compute counts in same query with GROUP BY status

Three-column allocator UI (SO summary / LP candidates / current allocations) → Server Component for SO+allocations data; LP candidates list is FEFO-sorted: SELECT lps WHERE product_id=? AND status=available ORDER BY expiry ASC NULLS LAST, received_date ASC
Auto/Manual mode pills → URL param ?mode=auto|manual; manual mode adds checkboxes to LP rows
FefoRank visual component → color-coded badge based on rank integer (1=green best)
QAStatus badge → map qa_status enum values to Badge variants
Override button → inline action triggering allocation_override_modal with LP pre-filled
Shortfall alert → compute server-side: qty_ordered - sum(qty_allocated)
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.allocation.*

label: pick_list_page
translation_notes: SH_PICKS static array → Drizzle query: pick_lists LEFT JOIN users (picker), LEFT JOIN waves; filter by status tab, search, picker, priority via URL search params
Tab counts computed client-side on mock array → include per-status counts in SQL GROUP BY subquery
Scanner launch card → render as Link href=/scanner/shipping/pick, not alert(); mobile-responsive card component
Progress component (current/total) → shadcn Progress primitive from @radix-ui/react-progress
Star priority display → map 1-5 priority integer to colored star icons, not raw emoji string iteration
Assign picker action in-row → open picker assign modal or inline Popover with picker select
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.pick.list.*

label: wave_builder_page
translation_notes: Two-column layout (available SOs left panel / wave kanban right) → CSS grid 300px 1fr with sticky left panel on scroll
SH_AVAILABLE_SOS static list → Drizzle query: sales_orders WHERE status=allocated AND NOT IN (select so_id from pick_list_sos); sort by promised_ship_date ASC
selectedSos client Set → useState sufficient since selection is transient; POST to Server Action with array
Wave kanban four columns (Unreleased/Released/In Pick/Completed) → query waves GROUP BY status, render WaveCol per status
WaveCol (sub-component, 27 lines) → extract as reusable component; Progress inside In Pick column uses shadcn Progress
Wave create form (priority + zone filter + release immediately) → inline sub-form, submit via Server Action: create_wave() inserting waves + wave_sos join rows
P2 route optimizer deferred → show disabled button with tooltip pointing to EPIC 11-J
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.wave.*
known_bugs: BL-SHIP-03: wave edit modal — Edit stub button on unreleased column without modal backing

label: pick_detail_supervisor_page
translation_notes: SH_PICK_DETAIL static → Drizzle query: pick_lists WITH lines (pick_list_lines JOIN license_plates JOIN locations), wave, picker user
Two-column layout (lines table left / summary+actions right) → CSS grid 1fr 300px
FEFO deviation highlight (fefoDev flag) → compute server-side: pick_list_lines WHERE actual_lp_id != suggested_lp_id
Short pick alert with count → aggregate pick_list_lines WHERE status=short
FefoRank / PickStatus sub-components → shared Badge-based components
Ltree path in location column → shared LtreePath component rendering ltree segments as chips
Real-time progress (picked/total) → consider SWR polling or SSE for live supervisor view; static on first load
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.pick.detail.*

label: packing_stations_selector_page
translation_notes: SH_STATIONS static array → Drizzle query: packing_stations LEFT JOIN active shipments; real-time online status from ZPL printer health endpoint
Three-column responsive grid of station cards → CSS grid repeat(3,1fr), collapse to 2 or 1 on mobile
Left border color (green/amber/red) based on station state → use data-state attribute + CSS or inline style mapping
SH_PRINTERS count → aggregate from printers table WHERE online=true
Station card click → navigate to /shipping/packing/[stationId]
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.pack.stations.*

label: packing_station_workbench_page
translation_notes: SH_PACK_SESSION static → Drizzle query: shipments with active_box (pack_boxes WHERE status=open), closed_boxes, queue of pick_list_lines assigned to station
Three-column pack layout (queue / box builder / summary+checklist) → CSS grid with pack-queue, pack-box, pack-summary classes; tablet landscape supported
scan input (autoFocus) → controlled Input with keyDown handler; production integrates with barcode scanner USB HID input
Catch-weight variance computation (cwVar) → move to server: compare actual_kg from input against products.nominal_kg, validate against products.variance_tolerance_pct (D-SHP-17)
Closed boxes table with reprint → query pack_boxes WHERE status=closed for given shipment_id; reprint triggers sscc_preview_reprint_modal
Ship-confirm checklist (checks array) → compute real-time from shipment state; pass as booleans from Server Component
Box dimensions inputs → store in pack_boxes.dims_json; validate positive numbers
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.pack.workbench.*

label: sscc_labels_queue_page
translation_notes: SH_SSCCS static array → Drizzle query: sscc_labels LEFT JOIN pack_boxes LEFT JOIN shipments LEFT JOIN customers LEFT JOIN printers; filter printed/error status
KPI tiles (printed/queued/errors/next_seq) → aggregate query + SELECT last_value FROM sscc_sequence
Bulk print selected (selected Set) → Server Action: bulk_print_sscc() with array of sscc_ids, dispatches ZPL jobs to printer queue
Print error alert for offline printer → real-time printer status from health-check endpoint; auto-retry on reconnect handled by printer queue worker
SsccLabelPreview at bottom → separate component rendered as HTML for screen; @media print CSS renders as 4x6 label layout
Printer select in reprint → query printers table with online status
SSCC-18 structure info card → static informational component, no data needed
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.sscc.*

label: sscc_label_preview_component
translation_notes: Inline HTML label layout → production renders via ZPL template server-side (Zebra ZPL II); this HTML is for screen preview only
GS1-128 barcode placeholder (.ssl-gs1 empty div) → integrate bwip-js or server-side barcode generation (e.g. node-barcodes) to render actual GS1-128 SVG
AI field mapping (01/10/17/3103) → map GS1 application identifiers directly from LP/batch/expiry/weight fields in Drizzle query
Allergens display (bold) → EU 1169/2011 compliance: allergen names in <strong> tags, same in PDF output via Puppeteer
maxWidth inline style → apply via CSS variable or Tailwind class; component is reused in modals and queue page
Hardcoded labels (GS1-128 · AI (00) etc.) → static GS1 standard text, not i18n needed

label: documents_hub_page
translation_notes: SH_DOCS_SLIPS / SH_DOCS_BOLS static arrays → Drizzle query: packing_slips / bills_of_lading LEFT JOIN shipments LEFT JOIN customers; filter by search/dates/customer/status via URL params
Two tabs (slips/bols) → URL param ?tab=slips|bols for deep-linking
Stale slip highlight (row-warning) → compute server-side: packing_slips WHERE generated_at < (last pack_box update for that shipment)
SHA-256 hash column → stored in packing_slips.content_hash / bills_of_lading.content_hash; display truncated + tooltip for full hash
Retention until column (BOL) → compute as generated_at + 7 years, store in bills_of_lading.retained_until
Regenerate action → packing_slip_regen_modal; Upload signed → bol_sign_upload_modal
BRCGS info alert → static informational component linking to compliance docs
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.documents.hub.*

label: packing_slip_preview_page
translation_notes: doc-layout two-column (controls left / preview right) → CSS grid sidebar + main; doc-page is printable HTML block
Hardcoded packing slip content (products/quantities/allergens) → Server Component loading packing_slips row with related sales_order_lines + allergen declarations
Template/language selects → packing_slip_templates table; multi-language P2 behind feature flag (V-SHIP-LBL-05)
EU 1169/2011 allergen bold declaration → server-side allergen aggregation per line, render <strong> in both HTML preview and PDF
Generate/regenerate button → Server Action + packing_slip_regen_modal; production PDF via Puppeteer edge function or Typst renderer
Version history list → query packing_slips WHERE shipment_id=? ORDER BY version DESC
SHA-256 hash display on generation → server computes and stores in packing_slips.content_hash, display in UI
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.documents.slip.*
known_bugs: BL-SHIP-12: multi-language packing slip (V-SHIP-LBL-05, P2) — dropdown disabled

label: bol_preview_page
translation_notes: doc-layout two-column → same pattern as packing_slip_preview_page; doc-page is printable HTML block with signature blocks
Hardcoded BOL content (boxes/SSCCs/weights) → Server Component loading bills_of_lading row with pack_boxes + sscc_labels + carrier + driver info
Carrier fields (pro number, freight class, HAZMAT) → stored in shipments.carrier_pro, shipments.freight_class; HAZMAT P2 behind feature flag (FR-7.44)
SHA-256 hash badge → stored in bills_of_lading.content_hash on generation; signed hash in bills_of_lading.signed_hash on BOL sign-off upload
BRCGS 7-year retention → Supabase Storage immutability; bills_of_lading.retained_until = generated_at + 7 years
Signature blocks (sig-block) → HTML placeholder for print; P2 21 CFR Part 11 e-signature replaces physical signature block
Aggregated allergen declaration → compute from all LP allergens in shipment via allergen_cascade_v1
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.documents.bol.*

label: shipments_delivery_tracker_page
translation_notes: SH_SHIPMENTS static array → Drizzle query: shipments LEFT JOIN sales_orders LEFT JOIN customers LEFT JOIN carriers LEFT JOIN bills_of_lading; filter by status via URL params
Expandable row (React.Fragment + expanded Set) → use Collapsible from @radix-ui/react-collapsible or row expansion pattern via DataTable with getSubRows
Ship timeline (4 steps: Shipped/In transit/Out for delivery/Delivered) → extract ShipTimeline component; step states computed from shipments.status
Inline delivery tracking update form (status/estimated_delivery/notes) → mini form in expanded row, submit via Server Action: update_shipment_tracking()
KPI tiles (packing/packed/shipped/delivered) → aggregate counts in SQL GROUP BY status
P2 carrier webhook → when implemented, replaces manual status update with webhook handler updating shipments.status automatically
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.shipments.*

label: carriers_list_page
translation_notes: SH_CARRIERS static array → Drizzle query: carriers WHERE deleted_at IS NULL; sort by is_default DESC, name ASC
P2 API integration info alert → static note; API fields (rate shopping/tracking webhooks) behind carrier_api_enabled feature flag
Deactivate button → Server Action: deactivate_carrier() with shipping_manager RBAC, UPDATE carriers.active=false
Rate basis badge → map enum values (Manual/Weight/Zone) to Badge variants
Tracking template column (URL with {pro} placeholder) → display as Link if static, truncate long URLs with tooltip
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.carriers.*

label: rma_list_page
translation_notes: SH_RMAS static array → Drizzle query: rmas LEFT JOIN sales_orders LEFT JOIN customers; filter by status tab via URL param
Scanner launch card → Link href=/scanner/shipping/rma-receive with SCN-072 context
P2 disposition/credit note/restock features → hide behind rma_full_workflow feature flag; show Phase 2 placeholder cards
Create RMA button → navigate to /shipping/rma/new (separate page or wizard modal, SHIP-027 detail — BL-SHIP-04)
Disposition column (Pending/Pass) → enum badge from rmas.disposition field
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.rma.*
known_bugs: BL-SHIP-04: RMA Detail screen (SHIP-027) 4-tab not built

label: shipping_settings_page
translation_notes: SH_SETTINGS static object → Drizzle query: tenant_settings WHERE module=shipping, or a dedicated shipping_config table; Admin-only via RBAC
Five tabs (allocation/wave/labels/d365/advanced) → URL param ?tab=allocation for deep-linking; each tab a separate form with its own Server Action
isAdmin role guard (disabled props on all inputs) → derive from session.role; render Fieldset with disabled attribute rather than per-input disabled
GS1 Company Prefix + SSCC sequence fields → read from shipping_config; sequence shown as read-only computed from PostgreSQL sequence last_value
Printers inline table → query printers table in labels tab, real-time online status from health endpoint
D365 tab fields are read-only (managed in 02-Settings) → render as Summary rows, link to /settings/integrations/d365
Save changes → separate Server Action per tab: save_allocation_settings(), save_wave_settings(), save_label_settings(); emit config.updated audit event
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.settings.*

label: customer_list_page
translation_notes: SH_CUSTOMERS static array → Drizzle query: customers LEFT JOIN (subquery counting allergen_restrictions), open order count; filter via URL search params
Tab counts (all/active/inactive/pl/uk) → SQL GROUP BY active flag + country/name pattern matching; avoid client-side re-filtering of full dataset
Bulk actions (activate/deactivate/export) → Server Actions with selectedIds array; export CSV streams response
Import CSV button → navigate to /shipping/customers/import (wizard, or use import-export ui_pattern modal)
Allergen restriction badge in table → aggregate from customer_allergen_restrictions count
Credit status highlight (row-warning on exceeded) → compute credit_utilisation_pct in query: credit_used/credit_limit
Allergen cascade explanation info alert → static informational component
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.customers.list.*

label: customer_detail_page
translation_notes: SH_CUSTOMER_DETAIL static → Drizzle query: customers WITH addresses, allergen_restrictions (refuses + requires_decl), open orders, credit info
Six tabs (profile/addresses/allergens/pricing/credit/history) → URL param ?tab=profile; pricing tab renders ScaffoldedScreen placeholder gated behind Phase 2

Allergen matrix (SH_ALLERGENS × refuses/requires_decl two-column grid of checkboxes) → controlled CheckboxGroup fed from customer_allergen_restrictions; Save button triggers Server Action: save_allergen_restrictions() with UPSERT
Live conflict query (current SOs with allergen conflicts) → sub-query: sales_order_lines WHERE so customer_id=? JOIN allergen_cascade computation, show only active/draft SOs
Credit tab — credit bar → compute pct server-side; P2 hard block info alert static
Address tab → CRUD table linking to address_modal; enforce V-SHIP-SO-02 here (count shipping addresses, warn if zero)
Order history tab → query sales_orders WHERE customer_id=? ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 4; export CSV Server Action
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.customers.detail.*
known_bugs: BL-SHIP-09: Pricing tab currently ScaffoldedScreen — needs P2 pricing agreements

label: product_create_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog with controlled open state via Server Action mutation
Local useState step machine → useReducer with typed StepState union or a finite-state-machine (xstate) for production robustness
Mock category/uom options → Drizzle query from `fa_categories` and `units_of_measure` tables in a Server Component passed as props
Submit simulate (setTimeout 600ms) → Server Action `createFinishedArticle(data)` wrapped in useTransition for pending/submitting state
basicValid inline boolean → zod schema `faCreateSchema` parsed per step; surface FieldErrors under each Field via useFormState
Hardcoded Polish labels (np. Kiełbasa…) → next-intl `t('fa.create.placeholder.name')` keys
toUpperCase on code field → zod .transform(s => s.toUpperCase()) server-side to avoid client/server mismatch
Audit log comment 'An audit record will be logged.' → emit outbox event `fa.created` on success with actor from auth session

label: archive_product_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog; use variant='destructive' styling on the confirm Button
reason.length >= 10 + ack checkbox → zod schema `archiveProductSchema` with `.min(10)` on reason and `.literal(true)` on ack; surface via useFormState
Mock product name fallback → prop `data.name` from parent server component; assert non-null before rendering
onConfirm callback → Server Action `archiveFinishedArticle({ faId, reason })` behind RBAC guard `can('archive', 'FA')`; emit outbox event `fa.archived`
Alert-red box text → next-intl key with interpolated product name; never hardcode Polish strings in production
Checkbox ack → shadcn Checkbox component; bind to react-hook-form Controller

label: bom_version_save_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog; title and subtitle come from parent BOM detail server component props
label + reason validation → zod schema `bomVersionSaveSchema` with `label: z.string().min(1)`, `reason: z.string().min(10)`
Hardcoded 'v8' default label → derive from `currentVersion + 1` computed on the server and passed as defaultValue prop
Save version onConfirm → Server Action `saveBomVersion({ bomId, label, reason })` that inserts a `bom_versions` row and bumps active pointer; emit outbox event `bom.version_saved`
Alert-blue info text → next-intl key; previous-version label should be injected from parent component data, not hardcoded
Add optimistic UI: disable save button during Server Action execution via useTransition pending state

label: bom_component_add_modal
translation_notes: window.MATERIALS global array with .filter() → server-side search endpoint `/api/materials?q=` or a Drizzle ilike query, debounced with useDebouncedValue; results paginated (20 items shown in prototype)
Inline <div> picker list with onClick → shadcn Command (cmdk) component; provides keyboard navigation, search and selection out-of-the-box
picked state + qty/scrap inputs → react-hook-form; validate qty > 0 and scrap >= 0 via zod `bomComponentAddSchema`
onConfirm callback → Server Action `addBomComponent({ bomId, materialCode, qty, scrap })` that inserts into `bom_lines`; re-validate BOM cost roll-up
Hardcoded slice(0, 20) → server-side LIMIT 20 in query; add 'Load more' or virtual scroll for large material masters
Hardcoded Polish currency 'zł' → format with Intl.NumberFormat('pl-PL', { style: 'currency', currency: 'PLN' }) driven by tenant locale
Add debounce (300ms) on search input; do not fire a query on every keystroke in production

label: delete_bom_version_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal with dismissible={false} → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog with onInteractOutside={e => e.preventDefault()} and no esc close
typed === target confirmation pattern → zod schema `deleteBomVersionSchema` with `.refine(v => v === targetLabel, 'Must match version label')`; target label injected from parent prop
onConfirm → Server Action `deleteBomVersion({ bomId, versionLabel })` with guard that checks no active WO snapshots reference this version before deletion; emit outbox event `bom.version_deleted`
Alert-red destructive warning text → next-intl key with interpolated version label; 'orphaned' concept should link to a help article in production
Font-mono input → use shadcn Input with className='font-mono' from the tailwind config; do not inline style

label: routing_step_add_modal
translation_notes: window.WORK_CENTERS global → Drizzle query from `work_centers` table fetched in parent Server Component and passed as `workCenters` prop to the modal
op.trim().length >= 3 → zod schema `routingStepAddSchema` with `op: z.string().min(3)`, `setup: z.number().min(0)`, `run: z.number().min(1)`
Hardcoded wc default 'CUT-02' → derive from first available work center in the fetched list or leave blank with required validation
onConfirm → Server Action `addRoutingStep({ routingId, op, wc, setup, run })` that inserts into `routing_steps` and renumbers downstream steps automatically per spec
ff-inline two-column layout → shadcn grid/flex layout using Tailwind `grid grid-cols-2 gap-4`; avoid inline styles in production
Hardcoded Polish placeholder 'np. Wędzenie — faza 2' → next-intl placeholder key

label: allergen_declaration_modal
translation_notes: Hardcoded allergen list array → Drizzle query from `allergen_types` reference table; list is ordered by EU Regulation 1169/2011 Annex II
Two Set states (selected, mayContain) → react-hook-form with zod schema `allergenDeclarationSchema`; store as `{ present: string[], mayContain: string[] }` object
3-column CSS grid checklist → shadcn Table with two Checkbox columns; use Controller for each checkbox cell
Auto-suggestions info alert → drive from a server-side allergen inference from BOM component flags; show diff between inferred and declared in the alert body

onConfirm → Server Action `saveAllergenDeclaration({ bomId, present, mayContain })` that updates `bom_allergens` table and triggers allergen matrix recomputation; emit outbox event `allergen.declaration_updated`
Hardcoded 'Save declaration' label → next-intl key; modal title should include BOM code/name from parent prop

label: eco_change_request_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal + Stepper → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog; implement Stepper as a shadcn custom component using StepIndicator pattern with aria-current='step'
Hardcoded approver names list → Drizzle query from `users` table filtered by role ('QA Manager', 'Technical Lead', etc.) based on impact_scope selection; approvers dynamic per impact
data.approvers.includes() toggle → react-hook-form with zod array field; validate `approvers.length >= 1` at submit

title + description + impact validation → zod schema `ecoChangeRequestSchema` with `title: z.string().min(5)`, `description: z.string().min(10)`, `impact: z.enum([...])`, `priority: z.enum(['low','normal','high'])`

onConfirm → Server Action `openECO({ title, impact, description, priority, approvers })` that creates `eco_requests` row, triggers approval-request email via `SET-090 Email templates`, emits outbox event `eco.opened`
Hardcoded Polish placeholder text → next-intl keys; priority options should come from a zod enum shared with the backend

label: eco_approval_modal
translation_notes: Dual-path radio (approve/reject) → shadcn RadioGroup with RadioGroupItem; bind to react-hook-form Controller; apply conditional bg color via cn() utility
rejectValid conditional → zod discriminated union: `z.discriminatedUnion('action', [z.object({action: z.literal('approve')}), z.object({action: z.literal('reject'), reason: z.string().min(10)})])`
ECO data prop (id, title) → typed `EcoRecord` interface; fetch from server before opening dialog to ensure fresh data

onConfirm → Server Action `reviewECO({ ecoId, action, reason })` that transitions `eco_requests.status` via state machine, notifies author via email template, emits outbox event `eco.approved` or `eco.rejected`
Conditional button className string concat → use shadcn Button with `variant={action === 'reject' ? 'destructive' : 'default'}`; never build class strings manually
Hardcoded Polish placeholder reason → next-intl key scoped to eco.reject.reason.placeholder

label: spec_review_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal read-only detail → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog; no form needed, only a 'Mark reviewed' action button that fires a Server Action
Hardcoded Summary rows (Customer, Shelf life, etc.) → typed `SpecRecord` from Drizzle joined query on `specs` + `spec_versions` + `customers` tables; pass as prop
Nutritional claim / marketing claim / allergen text block → structured `spec_claims` JSON column rendered as a dl/dt/dd list; do not use raw dangerouslySetInnerHTML

onConfirm → Server Action `markSpecReviewed({ specId, version })` that updates `spec_reviews` table with reviewer userId + timestamp; emit outbox event `spec.reviewed`; require RBAC guard `can('review', 'Spec')`
Hardcoded spec data (SP-0421, Biedronka, etc.) → all from parent prop; never hardcode customer names in component code

label: shelf_life_override_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog; BL-TEC-04 notes this override must trigger ECO — wire onSuccess to open EcoChangeRequestModal or pre-create a draft ECO automatically
newDays + reason zod validation → `shelfLifeOverrideSchema` with `newDays: z.number().min(1)`, `reason: z.string().min(10)`
Current shelf life read-only input → display-only span/Badge, not a disabled Input; avoids form submission of read-only values
Alert-amber 'Override leaves regulatory preset' → next-intl key; link 'QA sign-off' text to the relevant RBAC role required by the Server Action

onConfirm → Server Action `overrideShelfLife({ faId, newDays, reason })` that updates `shelf_life_rules` with override flag, logs to audit trail, and requires QA role; emit outbox event `shelf_life.overridden`
Hardcoded preset label 'PL deli-cured' → derive from `regulatory_presets` table via parent prop
known_bugs: BL-TEC-04: shelf-life regulatory preset switch not wired; currently read-only. Preset change must trigger ECO-triggering modal in production.

label: cost_rollup_recompute_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal non-destructive confirm → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog; no form, single action button triggers Server Action
Hardcoded '124 products' and '42 BOMs' → compute from Drizzle COUNT query before opening modal; pass as props `{ affectedProducts, activeBoms, materialRatesDate, laborRatesQuarter }`
~3 seconds timing estimate → remove from production UI; instead show a progress indicator or polling mechanism since real roll-up is async via a background job
onConfirm → Server Action `recomputeStandardCost()` that enqueues a background job (e.g. BullMQ task) and returns jobId; show toast 'Recompute started, you will be notified'
Alert-blue 'Non-destructive' → next-intl key; restate snapshot semantics clearly — production copy is not mutated until explicitly promoted

label: d365_item_sync_confirm_modal
translation_notes: window.D365_STATUS global → typed `D365StatusRecord` fetched from `/api/d365/status` server-side before opening the modal; pass as prop
Hardcoded 'D365 PROD (CT-EU)' → from D365 connector config in Settings; never hardcode env name in UI component
Queue size, last delta → live values from D365StatusRecord prop; show loading skeleton while fetching
onConfirm → Server Action `runD365DeltaSync({ itemCode? })` that triggers the connector gateway; returns sync runId for progress tracking via polling or WebSocket
Single vs all-items mode (data?.code check) → properly type `data?: { code: string } | undefined`; use conditional label from next-intl keys

label: d365_drift_resolve_modal
translation_notes: Dual radio direction (mp_wins / d365_wins) → shadcn RadioGroup; apply conditional card background using cn('border p-2 rounded', direction==='mp_wins' && 'bg-blue-50')
reason.length >= 10 → zod schema `d365DriftResolveSchema` with `direction: z.enum(['mp_wins','d365_wins'])`, `reason: z.string().min(10)`
Hardcoded drift object fallback → typed `D365DriftRecord` from parent; the modal should assert drift is defined before rendering, not silently fall back to mock data
Alert-red 'Cannot be undone automatically' → consider adding an undo window (60s grace period) similar to ECO approval; log to immutable audit table regardless
onConfirm → Server Action `resolveD365Drift({ driftId, direction, reason })` with RBAC guard `can('resolve_drift', 'D365')`; emit outbox event `d365.drift_resolved`; clears DLQ entry on success
Summary rows (Entity, Item, MP value, D365 value) → from `D365DriftRecord` typed prop; format numeric values with Intl.NumberFormat matching the field's original type
known_bugs: BL-TEC-01: MIG-D365-ALLG-01 — Item.allergens[] is unmapped in D365 field mapping. Drift cannot be detected for allergen fields until this is resolved.

label: tech_modal_gallery
translation_notes: TechModalGallery is a QA/development-only screen — do not include in production navigation; gate behind `NEXT_PUBLIC_STORYBOOK_MODE=true` or place in a separate Storybook story
TECH_MODAL_CATALOG array → replace with Storybook stories or a dedicated component playground route under /internal/design-system
Gallery card grid → shadcn Card grid layout; each card opens its modal via a Button; no production equivalent needed
onNav prop pattern → replace with Next.js router.push('/technical/bom') in the breadcrumb anchor

label: bom_list
translation_notes: BOM_LIST global array with client-side filter → Next.js Server Component that runs a Drizzle query with `where(and(statusFilter, ilike(bom.name, '%q%')))` and passes results as props; move filter state to searchParams for shareable URLs
KPI strip (Active BOMs, Avg yield, Cost variance, Open ECOs) → four separate Drizzle aggregate queries or a materialized view; each KPI is a Server Component tile
Pill filter tabs (All/Active/Draft/In review/Archived) → next.js Link components using searchParams `?status=active`; counts from a GROUP BY status query
bom-grid CSS grid → shadcn Table with sortable column headers using TanStack Table; add sticky header for large lists
Status badge `<Status s={b.status} />` → shadcn Badge with variant mapped from status enum; define variant map in a shared util
onOpen callback → Next.js router.push(`/technical/bom/${b.id}`) from a Client Component row click handler; make the whole row a Next.js Link for accessibility
Import/Duplicate actions → Server Actions or route handlers with optimistic UI feedback via useTransition
Hardcoded Polish cost 'zł' → Intl.NumberFormat locale from tenant settings

label: kpi_tile
translation_notes: Inline toneMap object → define a Tailwind variant map using cva() (class-variance-authority) for type-safe color tokens
Hardcoded px padding (14) → Tailwind p-3.5 or p-4 class; avoid inline styles in production components

KPI component reused across multiple screens (BOMList, ParamsScreen, MaintenanceScreen, TechDashboardScreen, CostingScreen, ShelfLifeScreen) → extract to `components/ui/KpiTile.tsx` as a shared component
Value rendered as mono div → use a semantic element; consider `<output>` or a `<strong>` depending on context; apply Tailwind `font-mono tabular-nums`

label: bom_detail_page
translation_notes: 7-tab layout (tree/routing/params/costs/versions/graph/sheet) → shadcn Tabs with TabsList + TabsTrigger + TabsContent; use URL hash or searchParam `?tab=tree` so tab is bookmarkable
BOM_TREE, ROUTING, VERSIONS globals → Drizzle query joining `boms`, `bom_lines`, `routing_steps`, `bom_versions` tables; run in parallel with Promise.all in a Server Component
Action buttons (History/Duplicate/Propose change/Edit) → Server Actions or Link buttons with RBAC guards; 'Propose change (ECO)' should open EcoChangeRequestModal
Status badge from `<Status s='active' />` + version badge → shadcn Badge components; status derived from server data not hardcoded
Tab count badges (e.g. '3 levels', routing count) → compute from server data; use Suspense boundaries per tab for independent loading
tweaks prop (costLayout: side/inline/drawer) → implement as a user preference stored in localStorage or user settings; default to 'side'

label: bom_ingredients_tree_tab
translation_notes: Recursive renderRow function with openKeys Set → use TanStack Table with `getExpandedRowModel()` and `getSubRows()` for production-grade collapsible tree; openKeys become table expansion state

costLayout tweak (side/inline/drawer) → three layout variants: 'side' renders CostPanel sticky aside; 'inline' shows percentage bar column; 'drawer' opens a Sheet component — implement all three via a cva layout variant
node type icons (sub-bom ⊞, packaging ◰, raw ○) → replace unicode chars with lucide-react icons: `LayoutGrid`, `Package`, `Circle`; apply aria-label for screen readers
Scrap percentage color (amber if > 2%) → Tailwind conditional class `text-amber-700` via cn(); define the 2% threshold as a named constant
Split layout `.bom-split` → CSS Grid `grid grid-cols-[1fr_280px] gap-4`; CostPanel sticky at top-[72px]
Total row hardcoded 11.82 → from BOM data; format with Intl.NumberFormat; assert total matches sum of children for integrity

label: bom_cost_panel
translation_notes: Hardcoded cost lines (Raw materials 9.84 zł, etc.) → typed `CostRollupRecord` from server; compute from `bom_cost_snapshots` table; show last-computed date
Hardcoded nutrition table → typed `NutritionRecord[]` from `spec_nutrition` joined to BOM version; show 'Not computed' state if missing
Hardcoded allergen badges → from `bom_allergens` table; use AllergenBadge component with present/may-contain variant; link to AllergenDeclarationModal for editing
sticky top-72 inline style → Tailwind `sticky top-18` (72px = 4.5rem); define as CSS variable if header height varies
D365 prices date '2026-04-01 → 2026-06-30' → from `material_price_validity` table; show stale-price warning if validity has expired
Section heads → shadcn CardTitle inside Card; remove inline border/padding styles

label: bom_routing_tab
translation_notes: ROUTING global array → typed `RoutingStep[]` prop from Drizzle query on `routing_steps` table joined with `work_centers`; ordered by step number
Column grid (7 columns) → shadcn Table; make 'Operation' column a Link to the work center detail page; ellipsis ⋯ action → shadcn DropdownMenu
Hardcoded totals row (102 min setup, 508 min run) → compute from SUM of setup/run columns server-side; format as hours/minutes
Step number display (r.n / 10) → store raw step numbers (10, 20, 30) in DB as integers; display as step/10 for the human label only

label: bom_process_params_tab
translation_notes: PROCESS_PARAMS global → typed `ProcessParam[]` from Drizzle query on `process_parameters` joined with `routing_steps`; CCP flag is a boolean column
CCP row highlight (background var(--red-050a)) → Tailwind `bg-red-50` applied via cn(); add `aria-label='Critical Control Point row'` for accessibility
ParamRangeBar inline SVG-like div → replace with a proper accessible range visualization; consider a `<progress>` element or a small SVG with aria attributes
Alert-amber CCP warning → shadcn Alert with `variant='destructive'`; 3 CCPs count computed from PROCESS_PARAMS.filter(p => p.ccp).length server-side
Hardcoded 'requires QA sign-off' copy → next-intl key linking to HACCP procedure number from tenant config
Column headers (Step, Parameter, Min, Target, Max, UoM, Tolerance, CCP) → use `<th scope='col'>` for accessibility; Tolerance column renders ParamRangeBar

label: bom_costs_tab
translation_notes: Inline bar chart (div percentage width) → replace with recharts BarChart or a proper chart library in production; the prototype's CSS-only approach is not accessible or responsive
Hardcoded cost breakdown array → typed `CostBreakdownLine[]` from `bom_cost_snapshots`; compute pct as (val/total)*100 server-side

'+2.1%' variance → compute as `(stdCost - plannedCost) / plannedCost * 100` from Drizzle query; color amber if > 0, green if <= 0
Sensitivity table (pork price, yield, energy) → parameterized sensitivity analysis stored in `cost_sensitivity_scenarios` table; not hardcoded
Color coding (blue for materials, amber for overhead) → defined by `CostCategory.tone` enum in the DB; use cva() for Tailwind color variants

VERSION_DIFF array (from/to/kind: add/rem/change) → typed `VersionDiffLine[]` from Drizzle query comparing two `bom_versions` JSON snapshots; use json_diff or a server-side diff library
VERSIONS array (v, date, summary, eco, author) → typed `BomVersion[]` from `bom_versions` table joined with `eco_requests` and `users`
Provenance section (NPD project link, approval chain) → from `bom_provenance` table; NPD link is a Next.js Link to the NPD project page
Downstream impact (Open WOs, Active specs, Customer contracts) → three separate COUNT queries; consider using Suspense for each count independently
Compare/View buttons → Link to a dedicated version detail page `/technical/bom/[id]/versions/[v]`; diff view available at `/compare?from=v6&to=v7`

label: bom_graph_tab
translation_notes: CSS flexbox column layout with div nodes → replace with react-flow (BACKLOG.md: Q2 Planning items reference dagre/react-flow for DAG); BOM graph is a DAG requiring proper node/edge layout
Hardcoded node data (R-1001 etc.) → computed from BOM_TREE recursive structure; pass as react-flow nodes/edges arrays built server-side
CCP process nodes (red border) → react-flow node type 'ccp' with custom styling; highlight edges leading to CCP nodes
Legend (sub-BOM, process, CCP, finished product) → implement as a react-flow Legend panel component; use the same color tokens as the node styles
Drag to pan / scroll to zoom comment → react-flow handles this natively; add `fitView` prop for initial zoom-to-fit
FlowArrow component → remove; react-flow handles edge rendering with proper SVG arrows

label: bom_recipe_sheet_tab
translation_notes: Print/PDF buttons → use a Next.js route `/technical/bom/[id]/recipe-sheet.pdf` with Puppeteer or a PDF generation edge function; add @media print stylesheet as noted in BL-RPT-04
recipe-sheet CSS class → define a print-optimized layout with `@media print` breakpoints; hide navigation, action buttons, and tabs when printing
Hardcoded ingredient table rows → typed `BomLine[]` from server; percentage column computed as `(qty / batchSize) * 100`
Hardcoded process steps (ordered list) → from `routing_steps.instructions` text column; render as an ol with semantic li elements
Allergen + compliance text → from `spec_claims` and `bom_allergens`; reference HACCP procedure version from tenant config, not hardcoded
Zatwierdzono date + author (A. Majewska) → from `bom_versions.approved_at` and `bom_versions.approved_by_user_id` joined to `users.full_name`

label: routings_screen
translation_notes: ROUTINGS_LIST global → Drizzle query from `routings` table with COUNT of linked products and routing steps; order by last-updated DESC
table with tr/td → shadcn Table; make each row a Next.js Link to `/technical/routing/[id]` for keyboard navigation

Duplicate button → Server Action `duplicateRouting({ routingId })` with optimistic row insert; show toast on success

PageHeader → extract as a shared layout component (`components/layout/PageHeader.tsx`) reused across all technical screens

OEE progress bar inline div → replace with shadcn Progress component; apply color variant based on threshold (>80 green, >70 amber, else red) using cva()
Status badge `<Status s={wc.status} />` → shadcn Badge with variant from status enum; status comes from server data

label: cost_history_screen

label: d365_status_screen

label: page_header

actions slot as ReactNode → type as `React.ReactNode`; render in a flex container with `gap-2 items-center justify-end`

label: grn_from_po_wizard

Multi-LP row grid (addRow/removeRow/updateRow) → react-hook-form useFieldArray; each row is a typed FieldArray element validated by Zod (qty > 0, expiry required, etc.)
poLines sample data with fully_received guard → backend-computed remaining_qty per PO line; row disabled + badge shown server-side
LP preview table in step 3 → optimistic preview computed from form state; real LP numbers assigned server-side on submit
submit() with setTimeout mock → Server Action; on success invalidate GRN list + LP list via revalidatePath; emit outbox event grn.created
Hardcoded PL product names and PO IDs → next-intl keys for labels; all IDs from real DB
Print label checkbox options → separate printQueue server action called after GRN creation, or a POST to label-service endpoint
Alert banners (alert-blue/alert-green) → shadcn Alert with variant='default' or custom colors via CSS vars

label: grn_from_to_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog; mark as size='wide' via DialogContent className override

transitLps inline array + checkbox toggle → Server Component fetches TO's shipped LPs from lp table (status='transit', to_order_id=TO.id); mark-received is a Server Action bulk-updating LP status + location
Row-level location select rendered only when checked → conditional FormField inside react-hook-form field array, revealed via watch()
Scan input (autoFocus) → useRef + barcode scanner keyboard wedge listener; debounce 150ms before LP lookup
Hardcoded TO reference and supplier names → props from parent page fetching TO details via Drizzle
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys

label: stock_move_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; form state with single useState object → useForm + zodResolver with discriminated union schema per moveType

isPartial / needsApproval derived booleans → Zod refine or superRefine; >10% adjustment triggers approval flow, not block — translate to a separate 'submit for approval' Server Action that writes to movement_approvals table
Inline LP lookup (lp input + Scan button) → combobox backed by /api/lps?q= server route or tRPC procedure; selected LP data fetched and shown below
Hardcoded destination options list → fetched from locations table filtered by warehouse and active=true
reasonRequired gated reason-code selects → dynamic Zod schema based on moveType; reason_code enum validated against allowed_reasons per move type from DB config
alert-amber >10% warning banner → shadcn Alert with variant='warning'; should also persist to audit log via Server Action
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys

label: lp_split_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; rows array state → useFieldArray in react-hook-form; each row typed with qty (number), dest (string), label (boolean)
Sum validator (sum === lp.qty) → Zod schema-level refine on the array: total_allocated must equal source_qty; surface via FormMessage
alert-box color tristate (green/amber/red) based on sum → shadcn Alert variant driven by computed status; keep accessible with aria-live
Destination location selects → ComboboxAsync backed by locations API; pre-selected to source LP location
LP genealogy record note → reminder for Server Action to write lp_genealogy row with operation='split' linking parent LP id to all child LP ids
Catch weight proration note → backend calculation, not UI; document in Server Action contract
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys

label: lp_merge_modal
translation_notes: 2-step wizard with Stepper → Dialog with internal step state; Stepper is a custom primitive; in production use a shadcn Steps pattern or Radix Tabs with disabled navigation
Primary LP scan + validation card → Server Action or tRPC query to validate LP eligibility (status=available, not intermediate); show inline validation result

Secondary LP scan loop with per-row validation (same batch ±1 day, same QA, same product) → useFieldArray; each scan triggers a Server mutation that validates and appends or returns a rejection reason
Rejected LP row with red background → TableRow with destructive variant styling and error reason inline
Summary with totalAfter computed → derived from useWatch over the field array; server must re-validate final totals on submit
Genealogy record note → Server Action creates lp_genealogy rows (operation='merge') for each secondary LP pointing to primary
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys

label: qa_status_change_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; transitions map (PASSED→[HOLD], etc.) → fetched from qa_state_machine config table or hardcoded enum in Zod schema if immutable
Dynamic reason-code select per target state → driven by transition config; in production pull allowed reason codes from qa_transitions table per (from_state, to_state) pair
COND_APPROVED and QUARANTINED alert banners → shadcn Alert with variant and contextual guidance; also gate shipping in a separate rule check server-side
valid computed flag gating submit → Zod formSchema.safeParse() result; disable button on !form.formState.isValid
Submit → Server Action: update lp.qa_status, insert quality_status_history row, emit outbox event qa_status_changed; RBAC guard required (QA role minimum)
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys

label: label_print_modal
translation_notes: HTML label preview (.label-preview div) → real ZPL/EPL rendering is a backend concern (BL-WH-04); in production render a React-based preview using the same field layout, but actual print job is sent as ZPL to the label service
WH_PRINTERS mock array → fetched from printers table (id, name, online status via last_heartbeat); poll or SSE for live online status
Queue checkbox → when checked, submit prints to a print_queue table with status='pending'; a background worker/cron drains the queue
Reprint history table → fetched from label_events table filtered by lp_id, ordered by printed_at desc; paginate or limit to last 10
Printer offline guard → server-side validation in Server Action; if printer offline and queue=false, return error; queue path always succeeds
isExpired / BLOCKED stamp → derive from lp.expiry vs today server-side; never trust client-computed value for safety-critical display
Hardcoded PL labels and template names → next-intl keys; template list from label_templates table
BL-WH-04 known: preview is HTML-structured, not real ZPL — production must integrate with label service
known_bugs: BL-WH-04

label: reserve_lp_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; form with LP picker and qty → useForm + zodResolver; LP field is a ComboboxAsync or scanner input
LP card shown after selection → data fetched via tRPC or Server Action by LP id; show product, qty, expiry, location
expBefore / conflict / isIntermediate derived warning banners → computed server-side in a validation Server Action called on LP select; return structured warnings as part of response
conflict alert (already reserved for another WO) → real DB check in Server Action: SELECT FROM lp_reservations WHERE lp_id=? AND status='active'
isIntermediate guard → check lp.item_type in ('intermediate') on server; block UI if true with V-WH-FEFO-005 message
Submit → Server Action: insert lp_reservations row, update lp.status='reserved', emit outbox event lp.reserved; RBAC: Warehouse Operator minimum
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys

label: release_reservation_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog with destructive variant styling on footer button

reason select with admin_override conditional text → Zod discriminated union schema; admin_override branch requires reasonText min 10 chars; RBAC guard for admin_override reason code (Manager/Admin role only)

Submit → Server Action: update lp_reservations.status='cancelled', update lp.status='available', insert audit event lp_reservation_released with reason code; high-visibility audit log for admin_override
Summary component → KeyValueList or Description List using shadcn primitives (no direct equivalent; compose from dl/dt/dd with Tailwind)
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys

label: fefo_deviation_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; both LP comparison cards (.fefo-compare) → a 2-column grid with Card components side by side; 'suggested' vs 'selected' styling via border/accent classes
Reason code list (batch_exhaustion, qa_release, etc.) → enum in Zod validated against fefo_deviation_reasons config table; 'other' branch requires reasonText
Submit (Confirm deviation) → Server Action: proceed with the picked LP, insert fefo_overrides row with reason, picked_lp, suggested_lp, expiry_delta_days; emit outbox event fefo_deviation_logged
fefo_override_rate metric note → aggregate query from fefo_overrides table for dashboard KPI; not computed in this modal
Cancel path → dismiss modal and use the FEFO-suggested LP (pass suggestedLpId as prop, caller re-executes pick with that LP)
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys

label: destroy_scrap_lp_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog with btn-danger confirm button; irreversible action pattern — require explicit checkbox confirmation before enabling submit
qtyToScrap < lp.qty triggers partial scrap note → Zod refine: if qty < source qty, note that a split will occur server-side before scrap; communicate this in help text
reason + reasonText (min 10 chars) mandatory → Zod schema: reason required enum, reasonText required string min(10)
confirmed checkbox → Zod boolean literal(true) field; without it form is invalid

Submit → Server Action: if partial, split LP first (creates new LP for remainder), then set scrap LP status='scrapped', insert stock_adjustment with qty=-qtyToScrap, insert audit record; emit outbox event lp.scrapped; RBAC: Warehouse Operator minimum; Manager for qty > threshold
Hardcoded PL labels + reason codes → next-intl keys; reason codes from scrap_reasons config table
BL-PROD-05: .btn-danger missing from production.css — ensure it is included in shared design token import
known_bugs: BL-PROD-05

label: use_by_override_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; isManager prop → derive from session RBAC; if not Manager, render read-only message with no form and no override button
ack checkbox + reason + reasonText all required → Zod schema with all three mandatory fields; submit disabled until valid
Override reason codes (operational_requirement, etc.) → from use_by_override_reasons config table; hardcoded enum acceptable if immutable

Submit → Server Action: insert use_by_override_log row with lp_id, manager_user_id, reason_code, reason_text, overridden_at; set lp.use_by_override_active=true with expiry; emit compliance outbox event; RBAC: Manager or Admin role required (enforce server-side)
EU 1169/2011 reference in alert → static text; no i18n needed for regulatory citation but localize surrounding text
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys

label: location_edit_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; create/edit duality via editing boolean (data prop present or not) → same modal, Server Action upserts via id presence
depthExceeded validator (parent.split('.').length >= 3) → server-side check against tenant max_depth setting from warehouse_settings table; also validate client-side via Zod refine
parent location select → ComboboxAsync backed by /api/locations?warehouse=X&maxLevel=2; show ltree path as label
code → uppercase transform on input (toUpperCase()) → Zod transform or onChange handler; validate uniqueness server-side in Server Action

Submit → Server Action: INSERT or UPDATE locations row, validate uniqueness of code within warehouse, validate depth ≤ tenant limit; emit outbox event location.created or location.updated; RBAC: Admin role required
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys; type options from location_types config

label: cycle_count_adjustment_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; P1 stub warning banner → shadcn Alert variant='default'; note in translation that full cycle count (BL-WH-01) is a separate Phase 2 feature
delta and deltaPct computed from actual vs system qty → Zod refine that also computes delta; expose delta as a read-only display field, not a form field
needsApproval (>10%) → same pattern as StockMoveModal; button label and Server Action path change; insert into movement_approvals table if approval needed
reason + conditional reasonText → Zod discriminated union; 'other' branch requires reasonText min 10 chars
Submit → Server Action: update lp.qty, insert stock_adjustment row with delta + reason, if deltaPct > 10 insert into movement_approvals; emit outbox event stock_adjustment_created
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys
known_bugs: BL-WH-01

label: state_transition_confirm_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; isDestructive → pass transition direction as prop; destructive transitions use btn-danger variant (fix BL-PROD-05 first)
transitions map (blocked→, available→) → server-driven allowed_transitions per from_state from lp_state_machine_v1 rule; do not hardcode in client
reason codes per to_state → dynamic from lp_state_transitions config table; avoid hardcoded switch in client
Submit → Server Action: update lp.status, insert lp_state_history row with from/to/reason/user/timestamp; emit outbox event lp.status_changed; validate allowed transition server-side before applying
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys
known_bugs: BL-PROD-05

label: force_unlock_scanner_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal size='sm' → Dialog with smaller max-w override via className on DialogContent
Hardcoded LP and user → props from dashboard alert; data fetched from scanner_locks table (lp_id, locked_by_user, locked_at, last_heartbeat)
Submit (Force release) → Server Action: delete scanner_locks row, insert audit event scanner_lock_force_released with admin_user_id; RBAC: Admin role required
Duration display '7 min' → computed from locked_at vs now server-side; pass as prop
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys

label: warehouse_dashboard
translation_notes: WhDashboard React.useState for dismissed alerts and feedFilter → Server Component for initial data; client component only for dismiss state (use useOptimistic) and feed filter (URL search param via nuqs)
WH_KPIS mock data array → parallel Drizzle queries in Server Component; each KPI is a separate aggregate (COUNT, SUM); cache with unstable_cache(60s TTL per WH_SETTINGS.general.dashboardCacheTtl)
role prop gating canSeeValue → Next.js middleware + session from auth provider; restricted KPIs render server-side as locked if role not in ['Manager','Admin']

WH_ACTIVITY feed → fetched from lp_events / movements table ordered by created_at desc, limited to 50; filteredFeed client-side filter → server-side query parameter or client-side filter on pre-fetched data
Alerts panel (WH_ALERTS) → fetched from warehouse_alerts table; dismiss → Server Action updates alert dismissed_by_user junction; alert CTA buttons open modals via client component
Expiry summary widget with top-5 table → two separate Drizzle queries: COUNT by tier, SELECT top-5 by expiry_date; both in one RSC parallel fetch
Intermediate buffer widget → SELECT from lps WHERE item_type='intermediate' AND status='available'; dedicated sub-component
FEFO scoreboard → aggregate from fefo_overrides WHERE created_at > now()-7d; separate RSC or parallel data fetch
Activity feed filter dropdown → client island with useState or nuqs; pre-fetch all activity and filter client-side, or use URL params for server filter
Hardcoded PL labels + warehouse name → next-intl keys; warehouse from tenant config

label: lp_list_page
translation_notes: WhLPList client-side filtering → Next.js page with URL search params (nuqs) for tab, search, status, QA, warehouse, location, itemType, expiry range, strategy; Server Component fetches filtered data via Drizzle with WHERE clauses
Tab strip (All, Available, Reserved, Blocked, QC Hold, Intermediate) → link-based tabs using URL param ?tab=; counts from DB aggregate per tab
Filter bar with 'Show more' toggle → second row of filters in a Collapsible (shadcn); all filter state in URL for shareability
Bulk action bar (selected.size > 0) → client island; selection state via useReducer or Jotai atom; bulk actions call Server Actions for print, move, destroy
Row inline actions (Split, Print label, More menu) → DropdownMenu with items; all open modals via client modal state
Pagination (50/25/100 per page) → URL param ?page=&pageSize=; Drizzle LIMIT/OFFSET; show total count
Column sort (not yet wired in prototype) → add sortBy/sortDir URL params; Drizzle ORDER BY dynamic column
isExpired / isUrgent row class → computed server-side from expiry_date vs now(); return as a computed field or pass days_until_expiry from DB
Export CSV button → route handler /api/lps/export returning CSV via Drizzle query
Hardcoded PL column headers and filter labels → next-intl keys

label: lp_detail_page
translation_notes: WhLPDetail with WH_LP_DETAIL mock → Server Component fetches LP by id via Drizzle with all relations (movements, genealogy, reservations, stateHistory, qaHistory, labels, audit) as parallel queries

Tab navigation (7 tabs: Overview, Movements, Genealogy, Reservations, State, Labels, Audit) → URL search param ?tab= with Tabs component; tab content as separate sub-components each wrapped in Suspense
LP identity card left column → always-visible; action buttons (Split, Print, Move, Block, QA, Destroy) → client island wrapping modal triggers; RBAC guards on each button

Genealogy tab visualisation (gen-canvas, gen-node tree) → custom tree/DAG render; in production use react-flow or a CSS-based indented tree; FSMA 204 export button → Server Action generating PDF via Puppeteer edge function
Reservations tab with Release button → client island; release opens ReleaseReservationModal
State history and QA history feeds (tl-item timeline) → timeline from activity_feed table; shadcn has no Timeline primitive; compose from div + border-left trick or use a community Timeline component
Labels tab with Reprint → print_events table; Reprint button opens LabelPrintModal with existing LP data
Audit tab with CSV export → lp_audit_log table; export via route handler
ext_jsonb custom fields → read from lp.ext_jsonb column; display as key-value table; editor is a separate Phase 2 feature (BL-WH-06)
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys
known_bugs: BL-WH-06

label: grn_list_page
translation_notes: WhGRNList client-side filter → URL search params for tab (status), search text, srcType, warehouse, date range, supplier; Server Component fetches filtered GRNs via Drizzle
Tab counts (All, Draft, Completed, Cancelled) → aggregate COUNT per status from DB; can be a single GROUP BY query
Filter bar selects (All sources, All warehouses, All suppliers) → options fetched from DB (distinct supplier names, warehouses); cache these lookup lists
Export CSV button → /api/grns/export route handler
Row click → navigate to GRN detail page; GRN table columns map to grns table columns
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys

label: grn_detail_page
translation_notes: WhGRNDetail with WH_GRN_DETAIL mock → Server Component fetches GRN by id with items relation (created LPs) and statusHistory; no client state needed for read-only detail
wo-summary-bar metric strip → compose from a dl/dt/dd grid or a shadcn Card with grid layout; no dedicated shadcn primitive
LPs created table (g.items) → links each LP row to LP detail via onOpenLp → in production use Next.js Link component to /warehouse/lps/[id]
Status history timeline (.tl-item) → same timeline pattern as LP detail; see LP detail translation note on Timeline component
Export button → /api/grns/[id]/export route handler
g.notes → render only if present; text block in a Card
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys

label: stock_movement_list_page
translation_notes: WhMovementList client-side filter → URL search params for tab, search, moveType, dateFrom, dateTo, location, lp, wo, user; Server Component fetches with Drizzle WHERE clauses

Side panel detail (.mv-side) → a Sheet (shadcn) that slides in from the right on row click; Sheet component replaces the absolute-positioned div; use useSearchParams or a local state atom to track selectedMv
Manager approvals tab with amber alert → filter movements where approval_status='pending'; dedicated DB query; approve/reject actions are Server Actions
Qty colouring (red for negative, green for positive) → cn() utility with conditional Tailwind classes; avoid inline styles in production
Ref links (WO- prefix → Open WO, GRN- prefix → Open GRN) → Next.js Link to respective detail pages
Export CSV → /api/movements/export route handler
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys

label: reservations_list_page
translation_notes: WhReservations → Server Component fetches lp_reservations with lp and wo relations; tab filter (active/consumed/cancelled/all) via URL param
Summary strip (totalActiveKg, lockedLps, activeWos) → aggregate query: SUM(reserved_qty), COUNT(DISTINCT lp_id), COUNT(DISTINCT wo_id) filtered by status='active'; not computed client-side
Create reservation button → opens ReserveModal (client island)
Release button → opens ReleaseReservationModal with reservation data as prop
Info banner about hard-lock auto-creation → static content; render in shadcn Alert
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys

label: inventory_browser_page
translation_notes: WhInventory with 3-view toggle (By product / By location / By batch) → URL param ?view=product|location|batch; each view is a separate Server Component rendering; all share the same filter bar
By-product expandable rows (inv-expand-ic toggle) → client island using Collapsible or accordion; on expand fetch LPs for that product via /api/inventory/lps?product=X or embed in initial payload
canSeeValue RBAC → server-side; pass hasValueAccess boolean from session; never expose value data in response if not authorized
By-location view with utilization bar → locations table LEFT JOIN lp_counts; util = lp_count / location.capacity; progress bar via shadcn Progress or a simple div
By-batch view → GROUP BY batch from lps table; show earliest expiry, total qty, LP count
Export CSV → /api/inventory/export?view=X route handler
Hardcoded PL column headers and filter labels → next-intl keys
BL-WH-05: By Location currently flat L2 table; production should support full ltree @> hierarchical browser
known_bugs: BL-WH-05

label: locations_hierarchy_page
translation_notes: WhLocations master-detail layout (tree left, detail right) → two-column grid; left side is a client island for tree selection state; right side re-renders on selection change via URL param ?loc=WH-Factory-A.Cold.B3
Location tree (.loc-tree, .loc-node) → custom tree component; no shadcn Tree primitive; use nested ul/li or a lightweight tree library; selected location keyed by ltree path
Bin occupancy mini-grid (.bin-grid, .bin-cell) → CSS grid; color class (empty/low/med/full) computed from utilization ratio; pass from server
Admin guard for edit/add buttons → from session RBAC; render conditionally server-side
Edit / Add Child / Deactivate buttons → open LocationEditModal (client island); deactivate → Server Action sets location.active=false with validation (block if LPs present)
LPs at this location table → fetched filtered by loc ltree @> path; paginated if > 25 (per prototype slice(0,25))
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys; location type icons are emoji in prototype — replace with Lucide icons in production

label: genealogy_traceability_page
translation_notes: WhGenealogy search + trace → URL param ?lp=&mode=backward|forward|full&depth=10; Server Component executes recursive CTE query on submit; Suspense boundary while querying

gen-canvas / gen-node tree render (CSS indented levels) → in production use react-flow or dagre-d3 for true DAG layout (per BACKLOG.md Q2 note for Planning; same applies here for Genealogy); prototype CSS indentation is only valid for linear chains
Forward/Backward/Full mode toggle → URL param; drives recursive CTE direction (WITH RECURSIVE upstream vs downstream); pass as server-side param
Depth range input → URL param; adds LIMIT on recursive CTE depth
Summary bar (nodes found, query time) → returned as metadata alongside query results from Server Action or route handler
FEFO compliance per node → annotated server-side by joining fefo_overrides on (lp_id, ref); fefo field on each node
Export FSMA 204 trace report (PDF) → Server Action calling Puppeteer edge function or a PDF generation library; button should be server-rendered with disabled state when no trace is loaded
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys

label: expiry_management_page
translation_notes: WhExpiry tab toggle (Expired / Expiring soon) → URL param ?tab=expired|expiring; Server Component fetches expired LPs (expiry_date < now()) or expiring soon (expiry_date < now()+7d / +30d) with mode filter
mode filter pills (All modes / use_by / best_before) → URL param ?mode=; Drizzle WHERE shelf_life_mode = ?
Expired summary strip (count by mode and blocked status) → aggregate queries; can be parallel fetches in RSC
Cron info line (last-run timestamp, next 3 runs) → read from cron_jobs table or a cached config key; 'Run cron now' for Admin → Server Action triggering the expiry check job

Row actions are context-dependent (use_by expired → Destroy + Manager override; best_before expired → Block + Destroy; expiring → View LP) → derive from lp.shelf_life_mode + lp.status server-side; render appropriate action buttons
Two info cards (use_by EU 1169/2011, best_before) → static content in shadcn Cards with colored left border; no dynamic data
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys

label: warehouse_settings_page
translation_notes: WhSettings left-nav sidebar + content area → two-column layout matching prototype; sidebar uses a vertical nav list; active category highlighted; sticky sidebar via position:sticky
Settings categories (9 cats) → URL param ?cat=general|numbering|grn|...; each cat is a separate form component; Server Component loads current settings from warehouse_settings table
isAdmin RBAC → all inputs disabled if not Admin; read-only banner shown; derive from session server-side; never trust client-side isAdmin
dirty state + unsaved changes bar → client island using useFormState; shadcn has no Unsaved Changes banner — compose from a sticky div + Button group
Each category form → useForm per category; submit calls category-specific Server Action that validates + upserts warehouse_settings rows; optimistic UI with useOptimistic
Locations and Integrations tabs are ScaffoldedScreen placeholders → render a simple placeholder Card in production until these sub-pages are built
WH_PRINTERS in labels cat → fetched from printers table; default printer select pulls live list
Rule registry links (fefo_strategy_v1, lp_state_machine_v1) → link to Settings → Rule Registry when built (SET-050 from BACKLOG.md)
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys; all setting labels and help text
BL-WH-02: Locations tab and Integrations tab are placeholders; full CRUD is on the Locations hierarchy page
known_bugs: BL-WH-02

label: app_sidebar
translation_notes: PSidebar static markup → Next.js layout.tsx with shadcn Sidebar (or SidebarProvider + Sidebar from shadcn/ui sidebar recipe); use Next.js Link for navigation items
Active state (className='active') → derive from usePathname() comparing to each item's href; or use Next.js Link's active class pattern
Module groups (Core, Operations, QA & Shipping, Premium) → sidebar section headers using SidebarGroupLabel
Icons (emoji ic spans) → replace with Lucide React icons mapped per module
Hardcoded module labels → next-intl keys

label: app_topbar
translation_notes: PTopbar global search input → shadcn CommandDialog (cmd+K palette) backed by a search API route; or a plain Input with a search route
Role switch buttons → prototype-only demo device; in production derive role from session; remove from production build
Auto-refresh dot + Refresh now button → client island using a polling SWR or React Query with refetchInterval; display last-refreshed timestamp
Avatar → shadcn Avatar component displaying user initials from session; tooltip with name + role + warehouse
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys

label: warehouse_sub_nav
translation_notes: WhNav vertical sub-nav for the warehouse module → secondary sidebar or a nested nav inside the main sidebar; use SidebarMenu inside a sub-group
WH_NAV mock (groups + items with key/label/ic/count/hero) → fetched from a navigation config or hardcoded; count badges from DB aggregate queries (e.g. pending alerts count)
nav-count badge on items → live count from DB; cache server-side with short TTL or update via SWR
hero 'Live' badge → static badge on configured items; driven by nav config flag
Footer (version, warehouse name, LP count, cron status, printer status) → small status strip; data from warehouse_status API endpoint
Hardcoded PL labels → next-intl keys
